* Develop and maintain a consistent visual identity that aligns with Air Apps’ brand guidelines.
* Create engaging graphics, illustrations, infographics, and layouts for web, social media, email campaigns, and print materials.
* Collaborate with Marketing, Product, and Content teams to translate requirements into compelling visual solutions.
* Iterate on designs based on feedback from stakeholders and refine assets using user insights and performance metrics.
* Ensure high-quality output and conduct design quality assurance across various channels.
* Utilize industry-standard design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) to create and deliver assets in multiple formats.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.
* Around 3 years of experience creating assets for digital marketing campaigns, social media, and web.
* Strong portfolio showcasing a range of design projects and styles.
* Knowledge of typography, color theory, layout, and design best practices.
* Proficiency in industry-standard design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Figma.
* Strong communication, time-management, and attention-to-detail skills.
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment and collaborate effectively across teams.


 What benefits are we offering?
   

  

* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


 Diversity & Inclusion
   

  

 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

 Application Disclaimer
   

  

 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients’ challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.
   

  

 We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, TUI and many more.
   

  

 At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified as a Great Place to Work® for five consecutive years (2022–2026) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in two fantastic offices in Vasastan (Odengatan and Upplandsgatan) and offer a flexible work policy.*
**Overview**
 We are looking for a highly creative Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you’ll work closely with our New Business teams, Strategists, Client leads, PR team and Creatives across the entire Power of One - shaping how we communicate, package and showcase our best work to clients. This includes designing pitch decks and client presentations but also creating case films, visuals, and social media content. The role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**What you’ll do**
* Design and elevate/beautify our internal and external communication and storytelling through strong visuals and engaging graphics - always on brand, always with impact. This includes e.g. pitch decks, client presentations, case films, visuals and social media assets for Publicis Groupe and our agencies.
* Build design systems and templates that help teams work smarter and faster.
* Translate ideas into powerful visuals that captivate, inspire, and “wow” our clients.
* Collaborate with New Business teams, Creatives, Strategists, Client Leads, PR and other teams across Publicis Groupe – as Power of One.


**Qualifications**
**Who you are**
**You Are a Graphic Designer Passionate About**
* Creativity & Storytelling: You love to tell a story and make things clearer, simpler, more beautiful and impactful.
* Craft: You have a strong eye for detail and care about precision, harmony, typography and layout.
* Speed & agility: You love a fast-paced environment and easily work with short turnarounds, without losing quality.
* Collaboration: You love working in teams with smart, kind and ambitious people.
* Problem solving: You translate complex comms and ideas into simple, sharp and visually engaging design.
* Hands-on: You are humble and happy to roll up your sleeves where needed.
* Proactive: You see what needs to be done and make it happen.
* Future-facing: You are curious and embrace change. A fast self-learner with a passion for new tech and tools.


 You have
   

  

* Experience from working at/with agencies with presentation design and visual storytelling.
* A strong portfolio showcasing presentation design and pitch materials.
* Mastery of Adobe Creative Cloud (especially Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign), motion/animation skills (After Effects, Premiere) as well as relevant AI tools (such as Google Gemini, Runway, Adobe Firefly and Claude).
* Strong skills in Keynote, PowerPoint and other presentation tools.
* Passion for exploring new AI tools and continuously finding smarter, faster and more efficient ways of working – while also elevating creativity, quality and impact.
* An understanding of brand identity and how to apply brand systems consistently
* Experience in how to create compelling branded social content.
* Excellent written communication in English and Swedish.


 What we offer
   

  

* A place in one of Sweden’s fastest-growing agency groups
* A creative, warm and collaborative culture across our Power of One model
* Opportunities to work on high-profile pitches and brand-defining projects
* A modern and flexible workplace with great colleagues, ambitious clients and lots of room to grow
* The chance to shape how Publicis and our agencies presents ourselves to the market -visually and strategically


**Additional Information**
 In addition to a welcoming culture and inclusive environment with passionate colleagues we offer you:
   

  

**Career Opportunities**
 Local and Global opportunities through the Power Of One.
   

  

**Personal and Professional Learning**
 Global AI learning platform where you can participate in +30 000 classes and connect with colleagues from all over the world.
   

  

**Flexible Ways of Working**
 We want to be an employer where work life balance is cherished. We love to spend time with our colleagues at the office but also believe in the output of your work not where the work is being done.
   

  

**Work Your World**
 For six weeks a year, the world is yours. Every employee can work anywhere on the planet where there's a Publicis office. A new city, a favorite locale, or even a different country - Go. Grow. Explore.
   

  

**Mental Health**
 The happiness and health of our people is paramount to us. We work continuously on maintaining a healthy and safe working environment through initiatives that facilitate the well-being of our employees.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Generous benefit package.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: SEO Specialist
description:
At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices.
 **In** 
**this document** 
**, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!**
*We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.*
**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
* Independently execute and optimise SEO tactics, ensuring they are aligned with the set strategic direction.
* Handle day-to-day operational tasks, including analysis, optimisation, and reporting, to ensure high-quality execution and optimal organic performance in standard search and search generative experiences.
* Extract and analyse data to uncover trends and insights that can guide tactical decisions and continuous improvement efforts.
* Conduct in-depth SEO analysis and audits to identify opportunities for improving brand strength and performance metrics.
* Implement testing initiatives, analyse results, and make optimisation recommendations to improve organic performance.
* Provide clients with concise, actionable recommendations based on data-driven insights, guiding strategic decisions.
* Collaborate closely with other Solution Groups to action learnings into the overall success of client experience and delivery.
* Proactively contribute to the overall growth of the SEO business.


**What We Are Looking For ✔️**
* Solid understanding of the digital marketing ecosystem, with the ability to operationally navigate all three pillars of SEO (Technical, Content & Authority) as well as AI generated search.
* Comprehensive hands-on experience and knowledge in using SEO tools & platforms (e.g. Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar) to tailor SEO strategies for brand and performance objectives.
* Technical acumen to identify, mitigate and resolve SEO-related issues, ensuring smooth execution of SEO activities.
* Strong capability to analyse performance data, identify trends, and derive actionable insights to enhance SEO efforts.
* Capability to design and implement roadmaps to achieve client goals and correlated targets, as well as showcase untapped opportunities within SEO and CRO.
* Ability to develop hypotheses and conduct tests to inform continuous improvement practices.
* Effective communication skills for engaging with clients on operational aspects and contributing to strategic conversations.
* Familiarity with data visualisation tools (e.g. LookerStudio) and ability to present insights in an engaging and understandable manner.
* In addition to specialisation in SEO, be comfortable with CRO & UX fundamentals and how these work together to impact total website performance.


**What We Offer🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary setting - you can find it below the job description on our website!
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


 🇬🇧 To make things as smooth as possible, please ensure your CV is in English.
   

  

**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**

title: Product Analyst - Merchant Information
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Tink was founded in 2012, and a decade later became part of Visa in 2012. Tink was created with the aim of changing the banking industry for the better. We have built Europe’s most robust open banking platform – with the broadest, deepest connectivity and powerful services that create value out of the financial data. We offer the tools that allow anyone – from big banks and fintech to startups – to build the future of financial services across Europe.
   

  

 The Data & Risk product family has a clear mission: transforming complex financial data into clear, actionable insights that empower institutions to make smarter decisions and consumers to improve their financial health. We are a tightly knit team of product managers, backend and frontend engineers, platform architects and data scientists working towards enabling data-driven decisions.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 We are looking for a Product Analyst to support the product team working on Merchant Information. You will help translate customer feedback and product needs into clear insights, support day-to-day product execution, and strengthen our quality practices through testing and validation.
   

  

 This role is a great fit for someone who enjoys working with data, product quality, and structured problem solving, and who wants plenty of room to grow into deeper analytical and modelling-oriented work over time.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Support in processing and structuring customer feedback, helping the team identify patterns, common issues, and opportunities to improve product quality and usability
* Support in creating visualizations, querying data, and analyzing quality signals to help track performance and guide product improvements
* Support in testing, validation, and QA, including helping validate behavior changes during migrations and ensuring outputs meet expected standards for accuracy and consistency
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to help clarify requirements, document expected behavior, and support reliable delivery across releases
* Help maintain lightweight documentation, reports, and follow-ups that make it easier for teams to understand quality, progress, and where to focus next


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Experience in a product analyst, data analyst, QA, product operations, or similar role in a technology-driven environment
* We are looking for a curious and detail-oriented person who enjoys working with data, product behavior, and quality, and who is comfortable collaborating with technical teams. You don’t need to have done all of the below before — what matters most is strong fundamentals and a willingness to learn.
* Comfort working with data, for example by using SQL, spreadsheets, dashboards, or other tooling to explore issues and communicate insights (tooling can be learned on the job)
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with attention to detail and an interest in understanding how systems behave end-to-end
* Experience supporting testing, validation, or quality assurance activities is a plus
* Clear written and verbal communication skills: you’ll help summarize findings, document outcomes, and support structured collaboration
* Interest in developing deeper expertise over time in areas like quality analysis, structured modelling, and data-driven product improvement


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Product Manager – Experimentation & Growth
description:
*Stockholm or Gothenburg | Start August 17 2026*
**About Conversionista**
 Conversionista is the #1 experimentation consultancy in the Nordics, driving evidence-based growth since 2010. We use scientific methods and structured experimentation to remove guesswork and prove what creates real business value. Our proven framework enables organizations to move from isolated tests to a scalable experimentation discipline across optimization, product validation, exploration, and personalization. As part of Eidra, we combine experimentation with strategy, technology, product, and design to turn insight into measurable growth.
   

  

**The Role**
 We’re looking for a consultant who combines strong experimentation expertise with solid product leadership.
   

  

**As a Product Manager You Will**
* Step into and lead product and/or growth initiatives at client organizations, from discovery to iterating on variations.
* Translate business goals and user needs into sharp problem definitions, hypotheses, and prioritized backlogs
* Design and drive structured experimentation programs (A/B testing, validation loops, insight generation)
* Collaborate closely with UX, engineering, analytics, and business stakeholders
* Define, monitor, and communicate success metrics tied to real business impact
* Internally at Conversionista, be part of developing and shaping the PM/PO offering further


**You’ll work from our offices in Stockholm or Gothenburg and at client sites. This is not a remote role.**
**Who You Are**
 You’re a product-minded problem solver with experimentation in your backbone.
   

  

* You take ownership from idea to measurable impact
* You work hypothesis-driven and are comfortable making decisions based on data
* You know how to lead cross-functional teams and align stakeholders
* You’re structured, pragmatic, and comfortable navigating ambiguity
* You actively look for smarter and more efficient ways of working, leveraging modern tools and technology to increase impact
* You’re curious, generous with your knowledge, and motivated by helping clients and colleagues grow


 At Conversionista, we value people who are professional, collaborative, and positive. We challenge each other, support each other, and continuously raise the bar.
   

  

**We’re Looking For Someone Who Has**
* 3+ years in a product role with end-to-end ownership (discovery, prioritization, delivery, iteration)
* Strong hands-on experience in experimentation and A/B testing – from hypothesis and test design to analysis and implementation
* Experience building or contributing to structured experimentation or growth programs
* A data-informed mindset, combining analytics, behavioral data, and user research
* Experience working in agile, iterative product development environments
* Strong technical understanding and confidence working closely with developers and data teams
* Experience using AI tools, automation, or emerging technologies to improve workflows, decision-making, or product development
* Professional English proficiency
* EU/EEA citizenship or a valid EU work visa


 Experience from consulting or fast-moving product environments is a plus.
   

  

**About Eidra**
 As part of Eidra, you’ll be surrounded by specialists across strategy, design, technology, and analytics. Together, we create meaningful and measurable impact for our clients.
   

  

**Start Date**
 We’re looking to onboard during Eidra’s official onboarding week in August 2026.
   

  

 Applications open until 22th May.
   

  

 We are conversion optimizers who help our clients use actual data instead of guesses. Armed with scientific methods, we reveal our customers’ growth potential and help them reach their business goals.
   

  

 We currently have over 60 conversion heroes in our five offices in Stockholm, Amsterdam, Oslo, Gothenburg, and Malmö.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective, we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Product Manager, Ad Solutions
description:
**The Company**
 Schibsted is the largest news provider in the Nordics, with brands such as VG, Aftonbladet, TV4, MTV, Aftenposten, Svenska Dagbladet, and Podme. Every day we inform, engage, and entertain millions of people across Sweden, Norway, and Finland.
   

  

 Since 1839, trust has been our foundation. Our journalism empowers people, builds communities, and strengthens democracy – and innovation ensures we continue to protect that mission.
   

  

 Our democracies depend on independent journalism. That’s our business.
   

  

**Strategic purpose of the role**
 As Product Manager, Ad Solutions, you are responsible for driving the development and evolution of key areas within Admarket — Schibsted’s advertising platform. You work closely with the Head of Product to shape priorities and ensure meaningful progress within your product domain.
   

  

 You translate strategic direction into clear initiatives, structured product work, and measurable outcomes. The role balances discovery and delivery, ensuring that product decisions create real user and business value while supporting the long-term development of the platform.
   

  

 You take ownership of your product area and are responsible for driving initiatives from discovery through execution.
   

  

**Role Tasks And Responsibilities**
* Translate strategic objectives into prioritised initiatives and actionable plans
* Define key success metrics and ensure transparent follow-up on adoption, performance, and business impact
* Lead structured discovery to validate problems and opportunities
* Manage backlog and prioritisation based on business value, impact, and feasibility
* Drive clarity in scope, trade-offs, and expectations across stakeholders
* Partner closely with Engineering and UX to ensure focused and efficient delivery
* Identify opportunities to improve, simplify, and scale workflows within your area
* Communicate product decisions and rationale clearly to relevant stakeholders
* Proactively explore new technologies and ways of working, including practical experimentation with emerging tools to improve speed, quality, and impact
* Stay informed about relevant market and competitor developments to challenge assumptions and identify opportunities for improvement


**Special complexity / challenges in the role**
* Operating in a complex platform where product decisions can impact multiple workflows, systems, and teams
* Balancing short-term delivery needs with long-term structural improvements
* Prioritising effectively within capacity constraints and competing stakeholder needs
* Driving measurable progress while safeguarding platform sustainability


**Hard Skills**
* Proven experience in digital product management, ideally in platform or advertising technology domains
* Demonstrated ability to lead product initiatives from problem discovery through delivery
* Experience with user discovery, product analytics, and iterative improvement
* Confident in engaging with stakeholders and navigating trade-offs


**Soft Skills**
* Strategic – Sees the broader direction and connects daily decisions to long-term goals
* Structured – Brings clarity and order to complex challenges
* Decisive – Makes informed decisions and takes ownership
* Curious & learning-oriented – Shows strong willingness and ability to learn, explore new technologies, and continuously develop skills
* Driven – Demonstrates initiative, energy, and persistence in moving work forward and achieving results


 We value curiosity, drive, and a willingness to learn. If this role excites you but you don’t meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply. We evaluate candidates continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline.

title: Product Lead
description:
**About Magma Math**
 Magma is one of the world's fastest-growing and most celebrated EdTech companies, transforming math education through the power of AI. Our platform turns handwritten solutions into digital insights, empowering teachers to focus on creativity and deeper learning - while giving them real-time visibility into student progress.
   

  

 The result? More inclusive, engaging, and effective math classrooms for all learners.
   

  

 But we're not just building better tools. We're tackling one of the biggest challenges in global education: math
   

  

 underperformance. With 1 in 5 students globally struggling in math - a subject that forms the backbone of so many career paths - we believe the opportunity to improve outcomes at scale is massive.
   

  

 We're already the go-to solution in thousands of schools - and we're just getting started. As we expand rapidly across the U.S. and Europe, we're building a team as ambitious as our mission: to help millions of students unlock their full potential in math.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Product & Tech team at Magma is divided into three core experiences: Teacher, Student and District. With a growing user base and plenty of problems to solve, we're hiring a Product Lead (Head of Student Experience) to own the student-facing part of our product and take full ownership of the space.
   

  

 You will define the vision and strategy for the student experience, manage stakeholders across the organization, and align priorities across teams. You are ultimately responsible for making sure every feature we ship moves the needle for learners.
   

  

 At the same time, you will act as Product Manager for one of the product units - working side-by-side with developers, QA and designers to plan, build and launch features. You will own a domain end-to-end - from figuring out what problem is worth solving, to shipping a solution, to making sure it actually creates value.
   

  

**Who You Are And What You Know**
* Have experience structuring complex problems, aligning stakeholders, and turning ambiguous challenges into clear strategies
* Have experience leading and growing product teams; you know how to build structure and set meaningful KPIs
* Be hands-on across the full product development cycle: user research, design, implementation, testing. This is not a pure project manager role where you are only coordinating
* Have strong technical understanding, enough to engage with engineers
* Be structured and always questioning the status quo - you plan ahead and look for better ways to work
* Be curious and eager to learn - and a team player who understands others' perspectives


**Your Responsibilities Will Include**
* Owning the vision, strategy and roadmap for the Student Experience, ensuring we remain leaders in our space
* Balancing long-term strategic planning with short-term, high-impact delivery
* Championing customer-centric thinking across the product lifecycle
* Leading a team of developers, QAs and designers as hands-on PM for one product unit, from discovery to implementation
* Coordinating efforts across the product, tech, customer success and revenue teams
* Setting KPIs and long-term goal structures
* Mentoring and developing team members


**Requirements**
* 3-6 years of experience with background as product owner or product designer, and proven track record in product management
* Experience of fast-paced and high-performance environments
* Experience leading people and teams
* Engineering degree (or equivalent) from top tier university
* Startup experience - you know what you are getting yourself into!


 Nice to have
   

  

* Experience in edtech or education
* Previous roles in software engineering or data science
* Portfolio of products you've built


 What we offer
   

  

* Real ownership - you set the strategy, not just the slide deck
* Build and ship high touch products with positive impact on millions of users
* Be part of driving change in an industry and in global education
* Ambitious colleagues in a fun environment
* Competitive remuneration & benefit package
* Annual company trip
* An opportunity to work on a meaningful mission and have an exceptional impact on education, society and how children learn math across the world


 Start: As soon as possible
   

  

 Location: Stockholm
   

  

**Our Recruitment Process (all In Office)**
* 1st interview with Hiring Manager and Head of People
* 2nd interview with Hiring Manager and Magma team member
* 3rd interview with Founders and Magma team member


 Note: We practice a 5-day in office policy, and we look forward to working together closely with you.
   

  

 Office location: Stora Nygatan 27, 11227 Stockholm, Sweden

title: Enemy Designer - ARC Raiders
description:
We are looking for an Enemy Designer to join ARC Raiders game teams here at Embark. In this role you will be designing enemy and NPC systems, including behavior and decision making.
   

  

 You will be responsible for detailed design work, writing, iterating and implementing designs for features and mechanics, around non-player entities and enemies, delivering high quality, balanced and scalable systems and player experiences for our game ARC Raiders.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with the other designers and engineers of the project, in refining concepts and ideas into tangible designs, prototypes and features, as well as Production leadership helping in articulating and establishing estimates, project scope and timelines.
   

  

 You will also own and spearhead game features directly, and work hands-on in cross disciplinary teams while implementing Gameplay Features, together with Animators, Coders and other design disciplines.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Design, implement and tweak Enemy behaviors and stimuli to create fun and interesting gameplay experiences
* Balance and tweak Enemy difficulty
* Work with world designers in establishing optimal conditions for the enemies to perform well
* Contribute in designing and implementing core enemy systems, including path finding, behavior trees, states and transitions, etc.


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* 3+ years of experience designing and making games, with shipped titles being a plus
* Experience working with enemy design and systems for games
* A good grasp of AAA PvP & PvE gameplay and systems design, including player psychology, UX design and gameplay mechanics and dynamics
* Proficiency with the Unreal Engine and experience with Blueprints and scripting
* A good knowledge and familiarity with the various disciplines: coding, animation, physics, 3D Art, etc.
* A great creative collaborative spirit in cross disciplinary groups
* Professional English communication skills


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Senior Software Engineer (C/C++)
description:
We are looking for a **Senior C/C++ Software Developer** to strengthen the engineering team behind our iNode platform. You will work within a small team of highly skilled engineers, taking ownership of the development, optimisation and quality of the software that powers routing services for telecom networks. You will gradually build domain knowledge in telecom — your colleagues will support you on the protocol and infrastructure side while you lead on the code.



This is a **hybrid role** based out of our **Gothenburg, Sweden** office, reporting to the **Manager, Operations**.

 **Key Responsibilities**


* Design, develop, test and maintain the iNode platform in C/C++.


* Implement new features and services for IP/IMS telecom routing.


* Write clean, performant, production-grade code with a focus on reliability and correctness.


* Collaborate closely with the broader team on integrated solutions.


* Participate in troubleshooting and debugging of production issues.


* Contribute to code reviews, documentation and continuous improvement of engineering practices.


* Participate in on-call duty rotation as knowledge of the platform grows.

 **Qualification and Experience**


* Strong, production-grade C and C++ — system-level programming, multi-threading, memory management, performance optimisation.


* Linux development environment: GNU toolchain, debugging, profiling.


* MySQL / MariaDB: ability to design and work with SQL schemas.


* Solid understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, sockets, protocols.


* Experience with unit testing, integration testing and CI practices.


* Bash scripting for development and automation tasks.

 **Good to Have**


* Any exposure to telecom signalling protocols (SIP, SS7, Diameter, INAP or ENUM) — even peripheral — is a genuine advantage.


* Go language experience.


* Perl scripting.


* Java, REST/SOAP APIs, Spring Boot.


* Experience with distributed or high-availability systems.

 **What we offer**

  

* Opportunity for growth and advancement
* Great team atmosphere
* Opportunity to leave your mark through the delivery of innovative ideas to the team
* Work for a stable and established company

  


**About Us:**

  


Enghouse Networks Sweden develops and operates IN and SIP/ENUM routing applications for telecom operators. We are forward-thinking specialists providing cost-effective, scalable and future-proof solutions which include rapid development, adaptation, implementation and 24/7 supervision and Managed Services. At the core of all our telecom solutions is our in-house developed iNode system.

  


#LI-EN8



#LI-Hybrid

title: Senior Software Architect (100% Remote - Worldwide)
description:
***Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance***


At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.

***Innovate with Tether***

**Tether Finance:** Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, **USDT**, relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.


But that’s just the beginning:

**Tether Power:** Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.

**Tether Data:** Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like **KEET**, our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.

**Tether Education**: Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.

**Tether Evolution**: At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.

***Why Join Us?***


Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.


If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.

**Are you ready to be part of the future?**

**About the job**


At Tether, we're building the infrastructure powering the next generation of financial products, tokenized assets, and digital currencies at global scale.


Our technology enables businesses, institutions, and platforms worldwide to interact with blockchain-based financial systems securely, efficiently, and reliably.


We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer to help design, build, and scale backend systems supporting mission-critical financial and tokenization infrastructure.


You will work on distributed systems, APIs, blockchain integrations, tokenization workflows, permissions frameworks, operational tooling, and enterprise-grade backend infrastructure used by millions of users globally.


This is a hands-on engineering role for someone who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, building scalable systems, and working in a fast-paced environment alongside high-performing global teams.

**Responsibilities**


Backend Development

* Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs in Node.js
* Develop reliable infrastructure components supporting high-availability systems
* Improve system scalability, performance, and operational resilience
* Contribute to architecture discussions and technical decision-making


Blockchain Infrastructure

* Work on integrations with blockchain networks and digital asset infrastructure
* Support systems related to token operations, permissions, transaction workflows, and operational controls
* Contribute to internal tooling and platform reliability improvements
* Help maintain secure and scalable infrastructure standards


Platform Scalability & Reliability

* Improve observability, monitoring, and operational tooling
* Support deployment workflows and infrastructure automation
* Collaborate on performance optimization and system reliability initiatives
* Contribute to technical documentation and engineering best practices


Cross-Functional Collaboration

* Work closely with Product, Engineering, and other internal teams
* Support technical discussions and implementation planning
* Help translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions

  

Core Skills

* 5+ years of experience in backend software engineering
* Strong hands-on Node.js expertise - this is the primary stack
* Experience building scalable backend systems and APIs
* Strong understanding of distributed systems and cloud infrastructure
* Experience with databases, asynchronous systems, and microservices architectures
* Familiarity with blockchain infrastructure and digital asset ecosystems
* Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
* Experience working in fast-paced engineering environments
* Experience with financial infrastructure or fintech platforms
* Familiarity with Ethereum and EVM-compatible ecosystems
* Understanding of token standards and blockchain transaction workflows
* Experience with monitoring and observability tooling
* Excellent English communication skills - mandatory


Nice to Have

* Familiarity with token standards such as ERC-1400, permissions frameworks, transfer restriction mechanisms, and multi-signature workflows
* Experience with tokenization platforms, custody providers, or institutional fintech infrastructure
* Familiarity with compliance tooling (KYC/AML integrations, whitelisting frameworks)
* Experience working in lean, remote-first engineering teams

**Important information for candidates**  

Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:

* **Apply only through our official channels.** We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
* **Verify the recruiter’s identity.** All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
* **Be cautious of unusual communication methods.** We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
* **Double-check email addresses.** All communication from us will come from emails ending in **@**tether.to **or @**tether.io
* **We will never request payment or financial details.** If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

**When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.**

title: IT-tekniker med inriktning nätverk och servrar
description:
Vi söker en engagerad och lösningsorienterad IT-tekniker med inriktning på nätverk och servrar. I rollen arbetar du med drift, underhåll, felsökning och utveckling av vår IT-infrastruktur. Du blir en viktig del av verksamheten och bidrar till att säkerställa stabila, säkra och effektiva IT-miljöer.
  
Om företaget
  
Levom DK är ett bolag inom koncernen Junevi, med kontor i Jönköping, Tranås och Vimmerby. Vi arbetar med att leverera trygga och effektiva IT-lösningar och värdesätter glädje, ordning och ansvar i vårt dagliga arbete. Vi söker dig som förstår vikten av samarbete och som bidrar till en positiv och välfungerande arbetsplatskultur. Vi tror också att du är en person som gärna tänker utanför boxen och hittar smarta lösningar i olika situationer.
  
Arbetsuppgifter
  
* Installera, konfigurera och underhålla nätverksutrustning och servermiljöer
* Övervaka drift, prestanda och tillgänglighet i IT-miljön
* Felsöka och åtgärda problem inom nätverk, servrar och närliggande system
* Arbeta med säkerhet, backup, uppdateringar och förebyggande underhåll
* Ge teknisk support till användare samt samarbeta med interna och externa parter
* Ta emot och hantera inkommande ärenden från användare och kunder
* Besöka kunder för installation, felsökning, support och andra tekniska insatser på plats
* Delta i utveckling och förbättring av olika delar inom nätverk och infrastruktur
* Dokumentera förändringar, rutiner och tekniska lösningar


Kvalifikationer
  
* Erfarenhet av arbete med nätverk och serveradministration
* Goda kunskaper i felsökning, drift och underhåll av IT-infrastruktur
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, självständigt och lösningsorienterat
* God kommunikativ förmåga och hög servicekänsla
* B-körkort är ett krav
* Meriterande med kunskap inom virtualisering, brandväggar och molntjänster
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av Windows Server, Active Directory och Microsoft 365
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av nätverksutrustning såsom switchar, routrar och trådlösa nätverk
* Meriterande med vana att arbeta i ärendehanteringssystem samt dokumentera tekniska lösningar
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av kundkontakt och arbete i miljöer där service och bemötande är viktiga delar
* Certifieringar inom exempelvis Microsoft, Cisco eller andra relevanta områden är meriterande


Välkommen med din ansökan! Skicka gärna ditt CV och personliga brev till Ansök - Dkgroup senast 2026-06-21. Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta oss på Ansok@Dkgroup.se

title: IT chef till Hydroware
description:
Hydroware utvecklar, tillverkar och säljer högteknologiska driv- och styrsystem för hissar. Genom stark fokusering på energi- och resurseffektivisering tillsammans med hissens reskomfort är vi idag en ledande leverantör till hissföretagen. Hydroware är ett företag som tar stor hänsyn till en hållbar utveckling, och verkar för att hissbranschen i stort skall inta en inriktning som leder till mer modulära hissar med standardiserade gränssnitt. Cirkulär ekonomi är en ledstjärna för oss. Idag är vi ca 200 medarbetare i gruppen. Vi har huvudkontor i Alvesta och finns även i Södertälje, Storbritannien, Tyskland, Nederländerna och Italien. Våra kunder är både stora och små hissföretag och vår försäljning sker till drygt 50 länder runt om i världen. Vi omsätter ca 500 MSEK och har ambitioner att fortsätta vår historia av god tillväxt. För att säkerställa att vi även i framtiden har de bästa produkterna på marknaden satsar vi stora resurser på produktutveckling och att skapa morgondagens hissar.### **Nu söker vi på Hydroware en ny IT chef som vill vara med och fortsätta vår resa med att utveckla IT-miljön och verkligen göra skillnad i verksamheten! Hos oss på Hydroware får du en nyckelroll där du kombinerar operativt ansvar med strategisk utveckling – i en organisation med stark laganda och stort engagemang. Här får du möjlighet att påverka, utveckla och växa tillsammans med oss.**

### **Om tjänsten**


Som IT chef hos oss på Hydroware får du en nyckelroll i att skapa en stabil, säker och framtidssäkrad IT-miljö. Vi utvecklar, producerar och säljer styr- och drivsystem till hisslösningar, och fungerande IT är helt avgörande för vår verksamhet – både idag och för framtiden.


Som IT-chef leder du vårt IT-arbete med fokus på det operativa – samtidigt som du är med och utvecklar våra arbetssätt och processer och driver det strategiska arbetet inom IT. Du har personalansvar för vårt IT-team på 3 personer och har ett nära samarbete med vår CIO/CFO i strategiska frågor och systemval. I rollen ansvarar du för att våra system och vår infrastruktur kontinuerligt stödjer verksamheten på bästa sätt.
I rollen kommer du bland annat att:

* Ansvara för drift, utveckling och säkerhet i vår IT-infrastruktur (nätverk, servrar, arbetsstationer)
* Säkerställa att våra system och processer fungerar effektivt i hela organisationen både i Sverige och i våra europeiska dotterbolag.
* Arbeta med budget, prioriteringar och kostnadseffektivitet inom IT tillsammans med CFO
* Vidareutveckla IT-strategin och omsätta den i praktiken
* Vara ansvarig för vårt ERP-system Monitor
* Arbeta med leverantörer och inköp av hård- och mjukvara
* Utveckla kontinuitetsplanering och säkerställa att vi möter externa krav på IT-säkerhet

Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera struktur och stabil drift med utveckling och förbättring.### 
**Vem är du?**


Vi tror att du som söker har en bred IT-kompetens och trivs i en roll där du får ta ansvar, driva frågor framåt och arbeta nära verksamheten. Kanske är du redo för nästa steg i karriären och ser det som en möjlighet att utvecklas med oss! Vi ser också att du har:

* 3-5 års erfarenhet av IT-drift, system och infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av att leda eller samordna arbete inom IT
* Utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* God förståelse för systemarkitektur, ERP och tekniska lösningar
* Förmåga att arbeta både operativt och strategiskt
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


Framför allt lägger vi stor vikt vid din personlighet i denna rekryteringen. Vi tror att du som söker är serviceinriktad och trivs i en supporterande roll där du får möjlighet att utnyttja din kommunikativa sida som gör att du lätt skapar förtroende inom alla delar av organisationen. Samtidigt är du analytisk och strukturerad. Du ser ett problem som en spännande utmaning att lösa och tar ansvar för ditt arbete som du driver framåt. Du har ett prestigelöst och positivt förhållningssätt som du gärna bidrar med till verksamheten. Hos Hydroware hjälps vi åt – och vi tror att du också gillar den typen av arbetskultur.  

  

**Vad erbjuder vi?**


Hos oss blir du del av ett företag i en spännande tillväxtresa där människor och utveckling står i centrum. Vi har en stark kultur som värnar om öppenhet, engagemang, ansvarstagande och respekt och engagerade kollegor. Som IT chef hos oss får du en viktig roll på företaget där du har möjlighet att påverka och utveckla vår IT-miljö samtidigt som du jobbar i en verksamhetsnära position med korta beslutsvägar och där det både finns stor flexibilitet, personlig utveckling och variation i vardagen. Vi hoppas du vill utvecklas med oss!


Skicka din ansökan senast 14/6 och berätta gärna om dina erfarenheter inom IT i ett personligt brev.  

**Ur****val kan komma att ske löpande under perioden**.


Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering i Alvesta.


Kollektivavtal: Teknikavtalet - Unionen.

 **Vill du veta mer om Hydroware?**


Besök gärna vår hemsida: www.hydroware.se


Se våra filmer om Hydroware:


https://hydroware.se/hissforetag/


https://hydroware.se/the-hydroelite-experience/

#### **Frågor?**

#### 
Hör gärna av dig till oss!


Per Brandstedt - CFO  

per.brandstedt@hydoware.se  

0472-451 06

title: UtbE lärare i säkerhetstjänst
description:
Vill du vara en del av någonting större och göra Sverige och världen säkrare? Bli vår nya kollega och utbilda Försvarsmaktens personal inom säkerhetstjänst! Här ges du möjlighet att arbeta i ett engagerat och kompetent lärarlag där du får möjlighet att utvecklas samtidigt som du bidrar till organisationen. Låter detta som någonting för dig? Läs vidare!


**Om befattningen**  

Befattningen tillhör Säkerhetsavdelningen på Utbildningsenheten. Här får du arbeta tillsammans med seniora och kompetenta kollegor som brinner för pedagogik och utbildning. Du tillsammans med lärarlaget kommer att bedriva utbildning inom säkerhetsskyddstjänst och säkerhetsunderrättelsetjänst.


**Arbetsuppgifter**  

Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter är att vara lärare och kurschef inom ramen för säkerhetsofficerskursen. Även uppgifter inom andra områden t.ex. IT- säkerhet och metodstödsystem förekommer.


I rollen som kurschef och lärare är arbetsuppgifterna att:


* Planera och genomföra kurser med tillhörande efterarbete
* Stödja i utbildning av säkerhetsunderrättelsepersonal, säkerhetschefer och IT-säkerhetschefer vid yrkesbefattningskurser för nationell och internationell verksamhet
* Delta i utvecklingen av säkerhetstjänstutbildning inom Försvarsmakten


**Kvalifikationer**

  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom relevant område som arbetsgivaren bedömer lämplig
* God förmåga att omsätta verksamhetsrelaterad utbildning, litteratur och underlag till pedagogiska lektioner
* God förståelse för gällande regelverk inom säkerhetstjänst
* God pedagogisk förmåga


**Meriterande kvalifikationer**

  

* Arbetat med Försvarsmaktens säkerhetsprövningsprocess
* Arbetat med Försvarsmaktens process för exponering av säkerhetskänslig verksamhet (f.d. SUA).
* Tidigare erfarenhet av underrättelse- och/eller säkerhetstjänst
* Har god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* God kunskap inom datakommunikation

  

**Personliga egenskaper**  

Vi söker dig som är intresserad av en omväxlande tjänst med hög grad av självständighet och ansvar, då befattningen innehåller både administrativt och praktiskt arbete. Förtroende är mycket viktigt eftersom du kommer att ha ett stort eget ansvar för att lösa tilldelade uppgifter. Det kommer också att ställas höga krav på god pedagogisk förmåga eftersom befattningen till stor del innebär att skapa olika inlärningssituationer. Struktur och noggrannhet är andra egenskaper som värderas högt när arbetet handlar om att vara med och utveckla underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten i Försvarsmakten.


Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personliga egenskaper.


*För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på* *www.forsvarsmakten.se**).*

  

  

**Upplysningar om befattningen**  

Linus Rahbek, Chef Säkerhetsavdelningen  

Nås via växel tfn 0505-45 10 00


**Information om rekryteringsprocessen**


Malin Ek, HR generalist  

Nås via växel tfn 0505-45 10 00


**Fackliga representanter**  

Officersförbundet: Jonas Nilsson  

Försvarsförbundet: Carolina Björkemyr  

SACO: Stephen Haughey


Samtliga nås via telefonnummer: 010-820 00 99


**Övrigt**  

Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning inkl provanställning sex månader  

Arbetsort: Uppsala  

Beräknat startdatum/tillträde: snarast eller enligt överenskommelse  

Befattningsnivå: Civil

  




**Sista datum för ansökan**  

Välkommen med din ansökan **senast 2026-06-12**. Din ansökan ska innehålla CV samt ansökningsbrev där du motiverar varför du är lämpad för denna befattning samt svar på angivna urvalsfrågor.

title: IT-samordnare Täljegymnasiet
description:
**IT-samordnare - 80% på Täljegymnasiet**

Täljegymnasiet är Södertälje kommuns största kommunala skola med ca 680 elever. Förutom de nationellt studieförberedande programmen Natur, Sam, Ekonomi och Teknikprogrammet, erbjuder vi ett introduktionsprogram, Individuellt alternativ och IB-programmet. Arbetet som IT-samordnare innebär bland annat att underhålla och drifta datorer för skolans elever och personal. Skolan har ca 70 anställda i olika roller och funktioner.  

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**  

I uppdraget ingår t ex att beställa reparationer av datorer, hantera lösenordsåterställning, hantera konton och datorer för nya elever och personal, hjälpa till med felsökning av konton, datorer och system. Vidare ingår att hålla efter och se över skrivare, felsöka och underhålla projektorer samt att förmedla kontakt med servicedesk och centrala IT.  

  

**Vem är du?**  

Vi ser att du är en kunnig, social och kommunikativ person som klarar av att arbeta i ett periodvis högt tempo. Du bör ha praktisk erfarenhet och arbetslivserfarenhet sedan tidigare. Inledningsvis är det en del rutiner att sätta sig in i början. -  

  

Krav:


* Gymnasieutbildning med examen
* Du har en nätverksteknikutbildning


  

Meriterande:  

* Du har arbetat i Microsoft-kontomiljö tidigare
* Goda kunskaper i engelska i både tal och skrift


  

Personliga egenskaper:  

Du är kompetent inom IT, social och kommunikativ. Utöver det är du stresstålig då arbetet i perioder innebär visst arbetstryck.  

  

Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.  

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**  

Skolan är centralt belägen och har nära till kommunikationer.  

  

Som anställd i Södertälje kommun erbjuds du en trygg anställning, bra anställningsvillkor och arbetsmiljö, kompetensutveckling och flera förmåner. Läs gärna mer om oss på vår hemsida och för mer information om våra förmåner: https://www.sodertalje.se/formaner  

  

  

Välkommen till oss!  

  

**Övrigt**  

Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande under ansökningstiden.  

  

Södertälje kommun arbetar med kompetensbaserad rekryteringsmetodik i syfte om att motverka diskriminering och främja mångfald på arbetsplatsen.  

  

Vi har många tjänster där vi genomför en registerkontroll. Ett registerutdrag (belastnings- och misstankeregister) från Polismyndigheten kan därför behöva uppvisas av kandidat före beslut om anställning.  

  

En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
  
**Titel:**  

IT-samordnare Täljegymnasiet  

  

**Omfattning:**  

80  

  

**Anställningsform:**  

Tillsvidareanställning  

  

  

**Sök tjänsten**
================


Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-06-10  


  

  

  

  

  

  

Fackliga företrädare nås via Kontaktcenter  

08-5230 1000  

  

  

Är du redo för Södertälje? Vill du arbeta i en av Sveriges mest intressanta skolkommuner? Kom till Södertälje, det är här det händer!  

Som ledare och lärare i Södertälje har vi ett uppdrag – att förbättra undervisningen i våra verksamheter så att eleverna utvecklas och lär sig. I Södertälje vill vi vara Sverigeledande när det gäller att utveckla undervisningen så att barn och elevers familjebakgrund får minskad betydelse.  

  

Att utveckla och förbättra förskolan och skolan måste göras systematiskt av skickliga ledare och lärare. Dessutom på ett strategiskt och långsiktigt sätt. Vår utveckling bygger på det skolforskningen visat är framgångsfaktorer för förbättringsarbete. I samtliga skolformer har vi en gemensam modell för det systematiska kvalitetsarbetet, där vi strävar efter att lära av varandra i syfte att utveckla undervisningen. Vårt fokus är hela tiden på vad som sker i undervisningen och hur det påverkar barnens och elevernas lärande och utveckling.





Ingela Hamlin  

Utbildningsdirektör

title: Senior Software Engineer - Graph Analytics for Snowflake
description:
**About Neo4j:**
Neo4j is the graph intelligence platform that transforms data into knowledge to power the next generation of intelligent applications and AI systems. It includes enterprise-ready knowledge graphs for accurate, explainable, and governed AI; the most comprehensive, trusted, and easy-to-deploy graph capabilities across any environment and data source; and an unmatched ecosystem trusted by 84 of the Fortune 100 and supported by the world’s largest graph community. Intelligence that works. Results that matter.


Built to work everywhere and integrate with everything across every cloud for dynamic, personalized, and autonomous AI systems. We deliver quicker results, contextual knowledge, and solutions that impact customers and employees across the business.


**Our Vision:**
At Neo4j, we have always strived to help the world make sense of data.


As business, society and knowledge become increasingly connected, our technology promotes innovation by helping organizations to find and understand data relationships. We created, drive and lead the graph database category, and we’re disrupting how organizations leverage their data to innovate and stay competitive.


**The Role**
------------


Join the team behind **Neo4j Graph Analytics for Snowflake**, our Snowflake Native App that brings the full power of Neo4j Graph Data Science directly into customers' Snowflake accounts, with no data movement required.


You'll work on a product that lives natively inside Snowflake: a containerized Java + Python runtime, a SQL-first API, and a release pipeline that ships graph analytics to enterprise data platforms. Our customers are data engineers and data scientists across financial services, supply chain, telco, and beyond, who use it to run PageRank, community detection, pathfinding, and node embeddings against the warehouses where their data already lives.


This is a hands-on, mid-to-senior role at the intersection of **graph analytics, cloud-native distribution, and DevOps**, with a meaningful say in the platform's technical direction.


**What You'll Do**
------------------


* Build and evolve the Neo4j Graph Analytics for Snowflake application, embedding Neo4j Graph Data Science into the Snowflake platform.
* Design and improve our **SQL-facing API**: stored procedures, UDFs, and the surface area customers call from their warehouses.
* Own significant parts of the **build, release, and deployment pipeline**: Snowflake CLI, Gradle, container images, and the Java/Python runtimes that execute inside Snowpark Container Services.
* Improve the platform's **security posture**: caller's rights vs. owner's rights stored procedures, restricted caller's rights (RCR), grants, and proactive image scanning.
* Collaborate with customers and Solution Engineers to turn real-world requirements into scalable features.
* Contribute to **operational excellence**: runbooks, release processes, observability, and reproducible dev environments.

**What You'll Bring**
---------------------


* 4+ years of professional experience building and shipping production-quality software.
* Strong **SQL** skills and real experience integrating with cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks, or similar).
* Solid grounding in **at least one of Java or Python**, and willingness to be effective in both.
* A genuine **DevOps mindset**: comfortable owning build pipelines, container images, releases, and the operational side of a product.
* Experience designing software for **performance, scalability, and predictable cost** on cloud infrastructure.

**Bonus Points**
----------------


* Hands-on experience with **Snowflake**, especially Native Apps, Snowpark Container Services, or building stored procedures and UDFs at scale.
* Familiarity with **Docker**, OCI image registries, and security scanning tooling (Semgrep, Snyk, Trivy, etc.).
* Understanding of graph theory and **graph algorithms** (centrality, community detection, pathfinding, embeddings), or strong curiosity to learn them.
* Background in **distributed systems**, JVM performance tuning, or columnar/analytical query engines.

Experience working in a **distributed, remote-first team** and shipping to enterprise customers.


#Li-Hybrid


**Why Join Neo4j?**
Neo4j is, without question, the most popular graph intelligence platform in the world. We have customers in every industry globally, and our products are a proven product/market fit. Joining our team is an opportunity to shape the future of data and analytics. Below are just a few exciting facts about Neo4j.


* Neo4j is one of the fastest-scaling technology companies in this industry. It recently surpassed $200M in annual recurring revenue (ARR), doubling its ARR over the past three years.
* Raised the biggest funding round in database history ($325M Series F). Backed by world-class investors like Eurazeo, GV (formerly Google Ventures), and Inovia Capital, Neo4j has raised over $600M in funding and is currently valued at over $2Bn. This puts Neo4j among the most well-funded database companies in history.
* 84% of the Fortune 100 and 58% of the Fortune 500 use Neo4j. Examples include Boston Scientific, BT Group, Caterpillar, Cisco, Comcast, Department for Education UK, eBay, NBC News, Novo Nordisk, Worldline, and others.
* Co-founder and CEO Emil Eifrem has built an amazing culture that prides itself on relationships, inclusiveness, innovation, and customer success.
* Countless industry awards. Massive enterprises and individual developers/data scientists love Neo4j. A strong sense of community and ecosystem is built around the platform.
* A recent Forrester Total Economic Impact™ Study cited Neo4j as delivering 417% ROI to customers.

Research shows that members of underrepresented communities are less likely to apply for jobs when they don’t meet all the qualifications. **If this is part of the reason you hesitate to apply, we’d encourage you to reconsider and give us the opportunity to review your application.** At Neo4j, we are committed to building awareness and helping to improve these issues.


One of our central objectives is to provide an inclusive, diverse, and equitable workplace for everyone to develop their potential and have a positive, career-defining experience. We look forward to receiving your application.


**Neo4j Values:**
Neo4j is a Silicon Valley company with a Swedish soul. We foster collaboration and each of us is empowered to contribute and put our innovative stamp on projects. We hire candidates who reflect the following Neo4j core values:


(we)-[:VALUE]->(relationships)
  

(we)-[:FOCUS\_ON]->(userSuccess)
  

(we)-[:THRIVE\_IN]->(:Culture {type: [‘Open’, ‘Inclusive’]})
  

(we)-[:ASSUME]->(:Intent {direction:’Positive’})
  

(we)-[:WELCOME]->(:Discussions {nature: ‘IntellectuallyHonest’})
  

(we)-[:DELIVER\_ON]->(ourCommitments)


Neo4j is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. Please read the privacy notice regarding Neo4j's recruitment process to understand how we will handle the personal data that you provide.


More information at www.neo4j.com.
