title: Associate, M&A/Private Equity (Junior Level)
description:
Our Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A) Practice is globally recognized as a top-tier leader in both public and private M&A transactions. We deliver unparalleled legal services for complex corporate deals, offering strategic planning, due diligence, negotiation, and execution of mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures, and other business combinations. Serving a diverse clientele, including multinational corporations, private equity firms and banks, our team ensures regulatory compliance, manages risk, and structures transactions for optimal outcomes. By combining extensive legal expertise with deep market insight, we help clients navigate high-stakes transactions, fostering growth and creating value, solidifying our reputation as one of the premier M&A practices worldwide.
   

  

****Vill du vara med och bygga världens ledande affärsjuridiska advokatbyrå?****
**Är du i slutet av din juristutbildning eller har du nyligen tagit juristexamen?** 
**White & Case söker associates till M&A/Private Equity med start i slutet av januari 2027.**
**Om oss**
 White & Case är en av världens största och främsta advokatbyråer. Sedan starten i New York 1901 har vi expanderat internationellt och etablerat 43 kontor i 29 länder. Många av våra klienter är multinationella organisationer med komplexa behov som kräver engagemang från flera av våra kontor samtidigt. Det betyder att vi arbetar i en dynamisk miljö med kollegor från hela världen och har gedigen erfarenhet av internationell affärsjuridik. Våra specialistområden på Stockholmskontoret inkluderar M&A/Corporate, M&A/Private Equity, Capital Markets, Debt Finance och Disputes.
   

  

**Vem vi söker**
 Vi söker dig som snart ska ta, eller nyligen har tagit, din svenska juristexamen och har ett genuint intresse för affärsjuridik. För att trivas hos oss tycker du om att arbeta projektbaserat, kommersiellt och i team. Vi tror även att du är en lagspelare och tycker om att utvecklas snabbt. Examen i företagsekonomi, tingstjänstgöring eller tidigare relevant arbetslivserfarenhet kan vara meriterande men är inget krav. Eftersom vi är en internationell byrå behöver du, utöver svenska, även ha goda kunskaper i engelska.
   

  

 Vi letar alltid efter individer som kan bidra med olika perspektiv och erfarenheter för att gemensamt leverera förstklassig service till våra klienter. Vi lovar att du kommer utvecklas snabbt i din roll som associate samtidigt som du kommer ha roligt och skapa både relationer och kontakter för livet.
   

  

**Rollen som associate**
 Som associate i vår Private Equity-grupp kommer du att bli en viktig del av ett sammansvetsat och växande team med bred och marknadsledande erfarenhet inom sitt verksamhetsområde. White & Case är den enda advokatbyrån i Norden med ett dedikerat Private Equity-team. Vi arbetar i högprofilerade ärenden med en mängd olika klienter, både svenska och internationella.
   

  

**Varför White & Case**
 På vårt Stockholmskontor är vi 130 medarbetare och arbetar efter våra värderingar Pioneering, United och Human. Vi strävar alltid efter att utvecklas och gör det helst tillsammans. Vi är en integrerad del av en av världens största och främsta advokatfirmor och har därmed unika förutsättningar att hantera de största och mest komplexa transaktionerna, processerna och andra affärsjuridiska frågor. På White & Case arbetar du i en organisation med täta kontakter med våra andra kontor där det är lika naturligt att prata med och träffa kollegor i London, New York, Paris eller Frankfurt, som kollegorna i Stockholm och Helsingfors.
   

  

**Rekryteringsprocessen**
 Vill du bli en del av vårt team? Ansök med ditt CV (på engelska), personligt brev (på engelska) samt betyg från juristprogrammet. Observera att din ansökan inte är fullständig utan att dina betyg från juristprogrammet är bifogade. Vi rekryterar löpande till tjänsten. Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Head of HR, Petra Lindeblad petra.lindeblad@whitecase.com, Talent Acquisition & HR Advisor, Cajsa Billebjer cajsa.billebjer@whitecase.com eller Partner Shoan Panahi shoan.panahi@whitecase.com
   

  

**Placering och rapportering**
 Placeringsort: Biblioteksgatan 12, Stockholm
   

  

 Rapporterar till: Ansvarig Partner på M&A/Private Equity Stockholm
   

  

**This role reports to**
 Partner
   

  

**Equal Opportunities**
 White & Case is committed to creating a fair workplace. It is our Firm’s policy to recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote without regard to race, religion, creed, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, military or veteran status, disability, genetic information, or any other category protected by applicable law.
   

  

 If you require assistance and/or adjustment to participate in our application and/or interview process, please email us. We will be happy to work with you.
   

  

 The Firm may modify and amend any job description at any time in its sole discretion. Nothing herein creates a contract of employment or otherwise modifies the at-will nature of employment.
   

  

 The above is only a general description of the essential duties associated with this position and does not represent an exhaustive or comprehensive list of all duties.
   

  

**Note to Recruitment Agencies**
 Our internal Recruitment team manages all aspects of lateral hiring. All agencies must have signed terms of business—specific to the relevant office—before submitting any candidates. CVs or applications sent directly to White & Case partners or employees will also not be considered formal introductions. If you have questions, please contact the relevant Recruitment team. We work with our preferred suppliers when engaging agencies.

title: EXPERIMENTATION & CRO LEAD
description:
**Experimentation & CRO Lead**
 SAS is looking for a data-driven and strategic Experimentation & CRO Lead to build and scale the experimentation practice across our digital commercial ecosystem. Sitting in the Digital Sales team within E-Commerce, this role is accountable for designing, running, and institutionalizing an A/B testing program that accelerates conversion, revenue, and customer value across the end-to-end digital customer journey on Web and App.
   

  

 This is a leading, hands-on builder role with the ability to influence and align work across teams. You will define the experimentation strategy and, in close partnership with Digital & IT, select and scale the experimentation platform, establish governance and guardrails, coach teams on hypothesis-driven decision-making, and embed a continuous learning culture across the Commercial organisation.
   

  

 You will operate cross-functionally across Commercial and in close, day-to-day collaboration with Digital & IT, with shared responsibility for enabling experimentation at scale. You will be the accountable owner of SAS's experimentation roadmap and velocity from a commercial perspective, with mandate to align and influence prioritisation across product squads, ensuring we learn and act faster.
   

  

 As the owner of the experimentation practice at SAS, you will have the mandate and executive sponsorship to shape how the Commercial area learns, decides, and grows. This is a senior individual contributor role with cross-functional leadership responsibility, initially without direct reports.
   

  

 Your mission is to embed experimentation as the default way SAS learns, decides, and grows its digital commercial business.
   

  

**Challenges You Will Work On**
* Build SAS's end-to-end experimentation framework, including tooling, governance, standards, and operating rhythm, in close collaboration with Digital & IT.
* Own and prioritize the experimentation roadmap across the full digital funnel, web and app. Define prioritization principles and influence allocation of experimentation capacity across product squads. Proactively identify friction points and revenue opportunities across the core journey and commercial segments, translating them into high-impact hypotheses and ensuring they are prioritized and planned into the relevant PM roadmaps.
* Extend experimentation beyond the core funnel into areas such as CRM, ancillary merchandising, and paid media over time, with initial focus on core digital journeys (web and app).
* Work with product leadership to secure dedicated experimentation capacity within product squads to ensure consistent execution and velocity.
* Drive increased experimentation velocity, with a clear ambition to scale the number of high-quality experiments.
* Apply AI where it adds practical value, such as supporting hypothesis generation, segmentation, and faster analysis of experiment results.
* Own measurement integrity: Define experimentation-specific success and guardrail metrics, in partnership with Analytics, validate instrumentation with Digital & IT, and protect the business from false positives and vanity wins.
* Translate experiment outcomes into P&L impact: Build the business case for experimentation, ensure winning variants are rolled out, and feed learnings back into the product and commercial roadmap.
* Build and lead an experimentation community of practice: playbooks, templates, experiment libraries, and regular learning cadences that embed test-and-learn as the default way of working.


**The Team**
 You will work as part of the Digital Sales team, within the E-Commerce area, and operate as the experimentation leader for the broader Commercial organization. Your closest partners will be Ancillary & Retailing and Performance Management, as well as Product Managers, designers, engineers, analysts, data scientists, and commercial stakeholders, with a strong working relationship with Digital & IT leadership teams.
   

  

 You will set the standards, govern the practice, and proactively identify high-impact experiment opportunities across the commercial funnel. Journey PMs own test planning within their stage roadmaps. As the practice scales, a dedicated Experimentation Analyst may support statistical execution and analysis.
   

  

 As the owner of the experimentation practice at SAS, you will have the mandate and executive sponsorship to shape how the Commercial area learns, decides, and grows.
   

  

**To be successful we believe you have**
* About 8+ years of experience in product management or growth, with at least 3-5 years directly owning experimentation, CRO, or conversion as a primary mandate in e-commerce, travel, marketplaces, or consumer digital products.
* Proven track record of building or scaling an experimentation practice from an early stage, including platform selection, statistical standards, and operating model design.
* Deep expertise in A/B testing and statistical methods: hypothesis design, power and sample size calculation, frequentist and Bayesian approaches, sequential testing, MDE, guardrail metrics, and common pitfalls such as peeking, sample ratio mismatch, and novelty effects.
* Hands-on experience with experimentation platforms such as Optimizely, Statsig, Growthbook, AB Tasty, or equivalent, and analytics stacks including Adobe Analytics, GA4, Amplitude, or Mixpanel. Familiarity with session tools such as Contentsquare or Hotjar.
* Strong commercial acumen and fluency in e-commerce KPIs including conversion rate, AOV, ancillary revenue, CAC, ROAS, LTV, and funnel drop-off, combined with the ability to work with data directly including SQL, dashboarding, and instrumentation validation.
* Experience running experiments across multiple channels including web, native app, paid media, and CRM lifecycle, with strong product discovery skills translating qualitative research and behavioural data into high-impact hypotheses.
* Demonstrated ability to influence senior stakeholders across a matrix organisation, with excellent communication and storytelling skills that make complex statistical concepts accessible to non-technical audiences.
* Experience in airline, travel, high-scale e-commerce, or product-led digital businesses is a plus.
* Full professional proficiency in English required.


**Why SAS?**
**Benefits**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 05/06/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As agreed
* Position: Full time
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.


 Come and fly with us!

title: Capital Markets Advisor
description:
As a leading firm in audit, tax and advisory, we combine deep expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver solutions that make a real difference. By bringing together experience and innovation, we help our clients become more efficient, adapt to change and stay ahead in a world that's constantly evolving. Join PwC - so you can help shape the organisations of tomorrow with us.
   

  

**Capital Markets - a part of our Advisory organization**
 At Advisory, we are organized into four units: Consulting & Strategy, Deals, Capital Markets, Reporting & Regulation, and Legal & Forensic. With a diverse mix of skills and backgrounds, Advisory offers holistic solutions that provide our clients with unique perspectives and insights, helping them address complex business challenges from strategy through execution.
   

  

 Within our Capital Markets practice, we advise clients across areas including corporate governance, risk and policy management, financial and sustainability reporting, HR, tax, IT, and more, collaborating with specialists in each field. We continuously explore how AI and new technology can enhance our services and delivery.
   

  

 We are currently seeking motivated individuals to join our Capital Markets team, where you can contribute across multiple areas based on your experience and continuously broaden your expertise.
   

  

 A career in our Capital Markets practice will give you the opportunity to:
   

  

* Support our clients through the entire IPO process from a preparation perspective; from initial discussions to the first day of trading.
* Be engaged in projects serving to improve our client’s governance structures and related maturity to enable their full business potential.
* Be engaged in projects supporting our clients to enhance their maturity within various areas such as policy management, risk management and internal controls, financial governance, sustainability, etc.
* Have the opportunity to work with AI-driven tools and emerging technologies to develop and improve our advisory services.


 Join us in an inclusive culture where inspiration and both personal and professional growth are central to everything we do. In this role, you'll contribute to collaborative projects alongside a team of experienced professionals and have opportunities to learn and advance with support from colleagues who value teamwork and continuous growth.
   

  

 ,
   

  

**What are we looking for in this position?**
 We are looking for professionals with experience within the following areas:
   

  

* IPO readiness and/or corporate governance in a listed environment
* External or internal audits
* Risk management and internal control
* Financial governance
* Project management in finance, or experience from a more senior position in the finance department of a listed company


 In addition to above, the following background and skills are preferred:
   

  

* University degree, for example in business administration, finance, law, economics or engineering
* 2-6 years of work experience
* High work capacity
* Advanced analytical and problem-solving skills
* Communication and presentation skills
* Initiative-taking, entrepreneurial and collaborative mindset
* Interest in capital markets and related areas
* Proficient in English and Swedish, written and spoken
* Experienced user of Microsoft Office applications (Word, Power Point and Excel primarily)
* Interest in and curiosity about AI and technology, and how these can be leveraged to develop and enhance our services and client delivery


 Project management skills are important in this role, and something that you will have the opportunity to further develop. As part of our team, you will contribute to the further development of our business, in a diverse environment that involves interaction with clients and collaboration within PwC.
   

  

 To perform well in Capital Markets, we think you are detailed oriented, skilled at relationship-building, able to handle changing priorities, innovative, and have the ability to deliver solutions under tight deadlines. We believe you are self-managing and have a high level of integrity. You are business-oriented and enjoy collaborating with multiple stakeholders and managing projects across a wide range of businesses.
   

  

**Application**
 Your application can be written in either Swedish or English. Submit your application to us as soon as possible, since we are continuously reviewing the applications.
   

  

**Please Submit a Complete Application Including**
* CV
* Cover letter


**Start date:** 
 As per agreement
   

  

 If you have questions regarding this position, please contact our team leaders: Victoria Hansson Chen, victoria.hansson@pwc.com or Malin Häggberg, malin.haggberg@pwc.com.
   

  

 If you have questions regarding your application, please contact the recruiter responsible below.
   

  

**Recruitment process**
 As part of the selection, we use psychometric tests to ensure an objective, unbiased, and fair selection. The assessments include a personality test and a deductive reasoning test.
   

  

 We value the personal meeting to understand the value you can bring to PwC and what we can offer you. The interview process usually consists of multiple stages and various types of interviews. When meeting with HR, you will have a competency-based interview where we examine the personality test you completed before the interview. During the interview with the business, you will have the opportunity to meet with the relevant team to discuss the role. We call for interviews continuously.

title: Payment & Cash Manager
description:
Lyten is leading an industrial revolution through Lyten 3D Graphene™, a breakthrough supermaterial unlocking a new generation of products — from lithium–sulfur batteries and energy storage systems to concrete admixtures, lightweight composites, and next-generation sensors that are revolutionizing industries. Together, these innovations are making a massive global improvement and driving real-world impact across energy, mobility, construction, and defense.
   

  

 At Lyten, we believe the most meaningful careers begin with purpose — and with people who want to make a difference. We’re not just developing advanced supermaterials — we’re about to change the world as we know it, reshaping how energy is stored, how products are built, and how progress is made.
   

  

 We’re entering an exciting growth phase, scaling production across the U.S. and Europe and expanding our team of engineers, scientists, and innovators.
   

  

 Apply now to join our team and be part of something bigger than yourself — where collaboration, creativity, and purpose come together to build the technologies that will define the next century.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Overall areas of responsibilities and activities
   

  

* Daily Cash Management: Monitor and manage the company's daily global cash position, executing intercompany transfers and external funding as required to optimize liquidity.
* Payment Operations: Oversee all outbound payment processing (AP wires, ACH, FX transactions), ensuring timely execution, fraud prevention, and compliance with all bank security protocols.
* Banking & Systems: Manage relationships with all banks, financial institutions, and payment processors. Administer and troubleshoot treasury management systems (TMS) and electronic banking portals.
* Forecasting: Prepare short-term cash flow forecasts (e.g., 13-week) to predict liquidity needs and identify surplus cash for investment.
* Compliance: Ensure all treasury activities comply with internal policies, external regulations (e.g., KYC, AML), and bank agreements.


**Requirements**
 Educational background and previous experience required for the role.
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, or Economics.
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in corporate Treasury, Cash Management, or Banking Operations.
* Proven experience administering electronic banking platforms and executing high-volume payment transfers (domestic and international).


**Qualifications And Experience**
* Professional certification such as CTP (Certified Treasury Professional) is highly desirable.
* Experience with a Treasury Management System (TMS) and integrating payment files with an ERP system.
* Working knowledge of foreign exchange (FX) settlement and currency risk management concepts.


 Specific skills
   

  

* Expert knowledge of bank transfer methods (e.g., ACH, Fedwire, SWIFT, SEPA).
* Strong proficiency in cash flow modelling and daily reconciliation processes.
* Excellent analytical skills for monitoring banking fees and optimizing transaction costs.


 Personal success factors
   

  

* Operational Excellence: Meticulous attention to detail and zero-tolerance for error in payment execution.
* Security Focus: Strong commitment to protecting corporate assets by enforcing robust payment security protocols and controls.
* Time Sensitivity: Ability to perform efficiently and accurately under the pressure of daily bank cut-off times.


**Why Work at Lyten**
 At Lyten, you’ll be part of a team that’s redefining what’s possible in energy, materials, and manufacturing. We’re not just imagining the future — we’re building it today with breakthrough technologies that are changing how products are made and how industries innovate.
   

  

 Our people are the heart of that mission. From world-class scientists and engineers to creative problem-solvers in operations, manufacturing, and commercialization, every member of the Lyten team plays a role in turning bold ideas into real-world impact. We believe that the best work happens when you’re doing great things in the world — with people you like. Collaboration, curiosity, and a shared sense of purpose drive everything we do.
   

  

 What You’ll Find at Lyten
   

  

* A mission that matters: Contribute directly to solving complex challenges in energy, mobility, and materials innovation.
* Cutting-edge innovation: Work on technologies at the intersection of materials science, energy storage, and advanced manufacturing that strengthen energy security and local supply chains.
* Extraordinary people: Join a team of talented, friendly, and down-to-earth innovators who support, challenge, and inspire one another every day.
* Teamwork and culture: Experience a workplace built on trust, respect, and shared success — where collaboration fuels breakthroughs and everyone’s ideas are heard.
* Global impact: Help scale new materials and energy solutions that reinforce industrial resilience across the U.S. and Europe.
* Career growth: Be part of a fast-moving company entering a commercial growth phase, with opportunities to lead, learn, and make your mark.
* Purpose-driven values: Thrive in an environment that celebrates ingenuity, optimism, and meaningful progress — together.


 Lyten offers the opportunity to do the most important work of your career — helping build the technologies that will power the next century of innovation.
   

  

 Join us, and help transform industries, communities, and the planet with friends who share your drive to make a difference.

title: Nationella underrättelseenheten (NUE) söker Underrättelseassistenter (GSS/K)
description:
Krigsförbandet NUE stödjer beslutsfattare på stridsfältet likväl som politisk nivå. Förbandet inhämtar information, analyserar dess innebörd och delger berörda chefer - nationellt som internationellt.
   

  

 Förbandet är underställt chefen Must och ingår inte i den nya underrättelsemyndigheten.
   

  

 För att möta de krav en föränderlig omvärld ställer innebär en tjänstgöring vid NUE en initial grundkurs som efterföljs av kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling. Allt för att inneha en god flexibilitet och snabbt kunna skifta fokus. Är du kreativ, social och analytisk med förmåga att se helhet och urskilja detaljer med intresse av internationell tjänstgöring? Då kan en tjänst hos oss vara intressant för dig.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
* Bedriver bearbetning vid förbandet.
* Biträder vid samverkan under internationell tjänstgöring.
* Upprätthåller de informationssystem och plattformar (inklusive databaser) som används vid förbandet.
* Utvecklar och stödjer chef med informationshantering (IM) vid förbandet.
* Samverkar vid behov inom FM och andra myndigheter i sitt arbetsområde.


 Utlandstjänstgöring är en obligatorisk återkommande del av befattningen. Frekvensen på rotationer planeras i samråd mellan medarbetare och chef, uppskattningsvis tre månader per år.
   

  

**Krav**
* Genomförd värnplikt med godkänt resultat. Om du genomfört GMU ska du ha tjänstgjort som GSS/K motsvarande tid som vpl.
* Godkända gymnasiebetyg.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, såväl i tal och skrift.
* Körkort lägst klass B.


**Meriterande**
* Tjänstgjort nationellt eller internationellt i underrättelse- eller stabsbefattning.
* Genomförd gruppbefälsutbildning.
* Goda IT-kunskaper särskilt avseende analysverktyg samt Officepaketet.
* Kunskaper inom andra relevanta informationssystem.
* Språkkompetenser utöver svenska och engelska.


**Personliga egenskaper** 
 Vi vill ha dig som är noggrann och har god stilistisk förmåga i både tal och skrift. Du har god systemförståelse och en god analytisk förmåga att bearbeta och analysera stora mängder text och data.
   

  

 Vidare har du ett gott omdöme och är ödmjuk inför uppgiftens komplexitet. Du har god självinsikt och mycket god förmåga att bygga och upprätthålla relationer, både med interna och externa parter. Under pressade förhållande har du mycket god förmåga att behålla fokus och prestera. Att hantera korta och långa deadlines är inga problem för dig.
   

  

 Du är nyfiken och vill utvecklas inom verksamhetsområdet. För att trivas i rollen är två av dina intressen läsning och fysisk aktivitet.
   

  

**Övrigt**
 I denna process ber vi dig att ha tålamod, du har många steg att gå igenom och det är ett stort antal sökande som ska genomföra tester.
   

  

 Tidslinjal och processteg:
   

  

 Digitalt test som visar på problemlösningsförmåga, samt personlighetsbedömning - fr. v.634
   

  

 Fystester -
 *LÖRDAG v.645 FM/EM*
 Skrivtest -
 *LÖRDAG v.645 FM/EM*
 Professionsintervju - fr.
 *v.650 - v.703*
 Psykologbedömning - fr. v.705
   

  

 Säkerhetsprövningsintervju - fr. v.710
   

  

 Du informeras löpande om du är kvalificerad för nästa steg.
   

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning, tillträde
 *2027-08-09* 
 . Tjänsten innebär också att du krigsplaceras.
   

  

 Tjänstgöringen inleds under augusti 2026 med en gemensam utbildning. Utbildningen omfattas av ca åtta månaders befattningsutbildning som innehåller bl.a. utbildning i underrättelsetjänst och militära färdigheter. Arbetstider under utbildningen kan vara obekväma under kortare perioder.
   

  

 Om du inte blir godkänd i momenten så avslutas din provanställning, har du redan en anställning i Försvarsmakten så sker en omplacering.
   

  

 Befattningen är placerad i Stockholm men resor förekommer.
   

  

 Urval sker löpande och din ansökan ska innehålla CV samt ett personligt brev. Sista ansökningsdag är 2026-09-30. I det personliga brevet vill vi att du motiverar varför du är lämpad för denna befattning. Bifoga även relevanta betyg och intyg så som vpl/GMU-betyg, akademisk examen samt kurser/utbildningar du hänvisar till i ditt CV.
   

  

*För att bibehålla god fysisk och psykisk hälsa så skall fysisk träning genomföras minst 3h/vecka på arbetstid. Arbetsgivaren står för träningskläder och vartannat år får du bidrag (f.n. 1.200kr) till träningsskor. Som anställd på NUE har du tillgång till samtalsledare som är specialiserad på insats och anhörigverksamhet.*
*Befattningen omfattas av sekretess så vi uppmanar dig att vara restriktiv i din kommunikation angående att du sökt tjänsten.*
 Frågor om befattningen eller rekryteringsprocessen kan mejlas till: hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se, vänligen ange ”Underrättelseassistent NUE” i ämnesraden.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter
   

  

 SACO - Anders Markow
   

  

 OFR/O - Roger Ericsson
   

  

 SEKO - Katarina Kruse
   

  

 OFR/S - Maria Ekelund
   

  

 Samtliga nås via hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se
   

  

 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Militära underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten (Must) är en del av Försvarsmaktens högkvarter i Stockholm. Vi ger regeringen och Försvarsmakten kvalificerade beslutsunderlag om omvärldsutvecklingen och hot mot Sveriges och Försvarsmaktens säkerhet. Vår vision är ”Ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker värld”. Must är en kunskapsorganisation och erbjuder både spännande och för Sverige angelägna arbetsuppgifter. Här arbetar både officerare och civila experter inom olika områden, t ex statsvetenskap, IT, ekonomi, teknik, matematik och HR. En stor del av Must verksamhet omfattas av sekretess och vi ber dig därför att inte berätta att du sökt jobb hos Must för andra personer än dina närmaste. Läs gärna mer om Must och vår verksamhet här Varje dag och varje timme gör våra medarbetare insatser som påverkar andra människors liv, både i stort och smått, och både på hemmaplan och runt om i världen. Försvarsmakten ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas som människa och växa i din professionella roll. Vi är en ansvarstagande arbetsgivare och har en öppen organisation där vi ställer upp för varandra. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård och bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Försvarsmakten tillvaratar de kvaliteter som mångfald och jämn könsfördelning tillför verksamheten. Vi välkomnar därför sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter i våra rekryteringar. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: Projektledare Digitalisering
description:
Hos Svenska kraftnät blir du en del av energiomställningen, där datadriven digitalisering är en viktig möjliggörare för planering, utveckling, drift och tillståndsbaserat underhåll av stamnätet. Du kommer att arbeta i en miljö där erfaren branschkompetens möter nya perspektiv och ett starkt fokus på utveckling. För att möta samhällets behov behöver vi bygga 30 mil ledningar och driftsätta 20 stationer per år. Ansök idag och få chansen att vara med och lysa upp Sverige!
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som projektledare ansvarar du för att leda digitalisering genom verksamhetsprojekt och delprojekt inom ramen för större uppdrag. Rollen kan innebära ansvar för flera parallella mindre projekt, eller att du leder ett delområde inom ett större uppdrag eller program.
   

  

 Du verkar i en komplex och stimulerande miljö där du får möjlighet att utvecklas, fördjupa din förståelse för elbranschen och bidra till den omställning som pågår i samhället. Du ges möjlighet att utvecklas vidare inom digitaliseringsledning och på sikt ta ett större ansvar som program- eller uppdragsledare i komplexa projekt och initiativ.
   

  

 Rollen innebär bland annat:
   

  

* Bryta ned strategiska förflyttningar till konkreta färdplaner, initiativ och projekt.
* Planera, driva och följa upp projekt utifrån mål, tid, kostnad och kvalitet.
* Hantera projektets omfattning, resurser, risker och beroenden.
* Säkerställa ändamålsenlig kommunikation med interna och externa intressenter.
* Skapa struktur, riktning och goda förutsättningar för genomförande.
* Samverka med andra projektledare, team och specialistfunktioner för att nå uppsatta mål.


 Tjänsten är placerad på enheten Digitalisering och IT-objekt som är en del av avdelningen Anläggningar på Svenska kraftnäts nätdivision. Enheten består av både medarbetare och konsulter som bland annat arbetar som projekt- och uppdragsledare, verksamhetsarkitekt, förvaltningsledare inom IT, kravanalytiker och användarstöd.
   

  

**Om dig**
 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du en god förmåga att samverka över organisatoriska gränser och att skapa förtroendefulla relationer med beslutsfattare, samarbetspartners och verksamhetsföreträdare. Rollen ställer höga krav på kommunikativ förmåga, tydlighet och samarbetsförmåga, då den omfattar många kontaktytor och ett omfattande samverkansarbete. Även ett strukturerat och analytiskt arbetssätt kommer vara en nyckel till framgång. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och du behöver även leva upp till den statliga värdegrunden.
   

  

 Vi letar dig med en universitets- eller högskoleutbildning inom exempelvis systemvetenskap, ekonomi eller teknik, eller annan utbildning i kombination med erfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig, exempelvis från yrkeshögskola inom IT eller teknik.
   

  

 För rollen krävs erfarenhet av att arbeta med att möjliggöra och driva digitalt stödd verksamhetsutveckling, med förståelse för hur verksamhetsbehov omsätts till hållbara arbetssätt, processer och digitala lösningar.
   

  

 Övriga krav för tjänsten:
   

  

* Minst tre års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet, varav minst två år i projektledande roll.
* Erfarenhet av att leda projekt i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT, företrädesvis inom energiområdet eller annan tekniskt komplex bransch.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i såväl tal som skrift.


 Erfarenhet av samhällskritisk infrastruktur och elsystem är meriterande, då det underlättar förståelsen för verksamhetens sammanhang, komplexitet och långsiktiga utveckling.
   

  

 Meriterande är också:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av arbete som konsult, med god förmåga att snabbt sätta sig in i nya uppdrag och etablera sig i komplexa organisationer.
* Erfarenhet av att leda projekt inom statlig myndighet.
* Erfarenhet av projektledning enligt PPS eller annan jämförbar projektstyrningsmodell.
* Erfarenhet av arbete enligt pm3 eller annan jämförbar modell för IT-styrning eller förvaltningsstyrning.
* Erfarenhet av att leda arbete enligt agila principer och arbetssätt.
* Relevant certifiering och/eller utbildning inom agila ramverk, projektledning eller styrningsmetodik.


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad på något av våra kontor i Stockholm/Sundbyberg, Västerås, Göteborg, Sundsvall, Luleå, eller Sollefteå.
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Sista ansökningsdag är 2026-05-29. Vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning.
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


 Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Martin Karlsson på 010-475 8193. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen går det bra att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Carl Isaksson på 010-489 2028. Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Senior Director, Brand
description:
**Mission**
 Neko is redefining what prevention means, from treating illness when it arrives, to sustaining health before it's ever at risk. Our mission: make data-driven, preventative care accessible to more people, before symptoms appear.
   

  

 In a single, non-invasive visit under an hour, proprietary technology and direct clinical care combine to deliver personalised, actionable insights. It's a team that thinks in 10x, not 10%. Every role here plays a part in building a world where prevention is the norm, and where your work genuinely helps people live longer, healthier lives.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 Neko has done something remarkable: thousands of scans completed, a waitlist of over 100,000 people, a product that genuinely changes lives and a growing body of proof to show for it.
   

  

 But word of mouth and an exceptional product can only take us so far. The next chapter needs a known brand and consistent demand - the kind that scales Neko from a phenomenon to a category leader - accessible, essential and iconic. As our Brand Leader you will set that vision, build the team, and make the calls that turn Neko into one of the world's most distinctive, fundamental and desired brands.
   

  

**What You’ll Deliver In The First 6-12 Months**
* Define and launch Neko's global brand strategy and positioning - including visual identity system, tone of voice, and messaging architecture — ready to scale across Sweden, the UK, and the US.
* Work closely with the CMO, marketing, growth and product teams to ensure the brand narrative drives the funnel, carrying the same clarity and conviction through to search and performance marketing.
* Lead brand strategy for the New York market entry, approaching it with sensitivity to where that market is in its relationship with preventive health - whether familiar territory or somewhere we need to bring people with us.
* Identify the partnerships and collaborations that place Neko inside the spaces where our audience already invests in themselves, making the brand feel necessary and immediate.
* Build an ambassador and talent strategy around the right people - not just well-known, but credible, precise and genuinely aligned with what Neko stands for.
* Develop a social presence led by human stories: early detection moments told in the voices of the people they happened to, creating the conditions for organic advocacy that no paid campaign can replicate.
* Make icons of Neko's clinicians - putting real faces, real expertise, and real trust at the center of the brand in an era of wellness noise and misinformation.
* Build and hire the core brand team: brand leads, strategists, communications planners, content leads - the best people, brought together often enough to do their best work.
* Establish brand governance and a measurement framework - tracking awareness, consideration, and sentiment.


**Requirements**
* 15+ years of brand leadership, with significant experience building or scaling brands at consumer-facing companies - ideally across health, consumer tech, or lifestyle.
* Proven ability to define brand positioning and translate it into creative work that earns genuine cultural gravity, not just recognition.
* Experience leading high-performing creative teams.
* Demonstrated track record of launching brands in new geographies, with the sensitivity to adapt to different markets and audiences.
* Regulatory savvy - knowing exactly where the boundaries of health communication sit and finding the creative opportunity within them, not around them.
* Exceptional strategic and creative judgment, with the ability to make confident calls on where the brand shows up, who it speaks to, and what it stands for - with full accountability to connect those calls to real business outcomes.
* Strong cross-functional collaborator, comfortable in a fast-moving, founder-led environment alongside Product, Clinical, and Growth teams.
* Genuine curiosity about health, science, and the role technology can play in improving human lives.


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.
   

  

 Compensation Range: $275K - $305K

title: Solution Consultant - ServiceNow in Stockholm
description:
**ServiceNow Solution Consultant**
 At
 **Sofigate** 
 , we help organizations transform business and technology together. We believe the future of Business Technology is built on platform excellence, AI innovation, and strong stakeholder engagement. With
 **over 800 professionals across the Nordics** 
 , we help our clients transform their businesses end-to-end.
   

  

 We are now looking for an experienced
 **ServiceNow Solution Consultant** 
 to join our
 **Platforms business stream.** 
 You’ll play a key role in helping our customers succeed in their digital transformation journeys – combining platform expertise, business understanding, and a passion for AI-driven innovation.
   

  

**Your role**
 As a
 **ServiceNow Solution Consultant** 
 , you will:
   

  

* Collaborate with customers to design and implement solutions that drive measurable business value.
* Translate business goals into technical requirements and deliver scalable ServiceNow solutions.
* Work across the full lifecycle of platform delivery – from design and configuration to rollout and adoption.
* Apply modern ways of working, including Agile, DevOps, and proof-of-concept approaches.
* Support customer success through advisory, solution optimisation, and continuous improvement.
* Stay ahead of platform advancements, AI-enabled features, and regulatory developments to ensure customers get the most out of their investments.


**What You Bring**
* A few years of experience working with ServiceNow and potentially other cloud-based solutions.
+ ServiceNow mainland certs is considered a strong plus.

* Strong understanding of platform architecture, configuration, and integration concepts.
* Ability to translate business needs into platform-driven solutions and communicate effectively with both technical and business stakeholders.
* Experience with Agile methodologies, DevOps models, and proof-of-concept approaches.
* Hands-on experience with AI concepts, such as:
+ Generative AI and AI agents for workflow automation and decision support.
+ Identifying AI use cases and integrating AI services into platforms.
+ Familiarity with tools like Azure AI, OpenAI APIs, or ServiceNow AI modules.
+ Passion for technology and innovation, and curiosity for how AI and automation reshape modern organisations.

* Educational background with at least a BSc. in relevant fields (IT, Management, Engineering or similar.
* Please note that fluency in both Swedish and English is required.


**Why Sofigate**
 At
 **Sofigate** 
 , we invest in your growth. We believe your career should evolve with technology and business needs. That’s why we offer:
   

  

* Continuous learning and funded certifications relevant for your field.
* A clear career development framework to support your growth as a Sofigator.
* Exposure to diverse industries and projects, building expertise across sectors.
* An international, vibrant, and fun culture with openness and flexibility.
* A healthy work-life balance, with wellbeing and inclusion at the core.
* A Nordic community built on collaboration, trust, and entrepreneurship, where your ideas shape the future.
* An inclusive environment where diverse perspectives and backgrounds are valued.


**We would like to hear from you**
 Tell us your story and let us know why you are the change maker we are looking for. Please submit your application and CV in English.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please contact:
   

  

 Lotta Ekman, Human Resources at lotta.ekman@sofigate.com
   

  

**About Sofigate**
 We are The Business Technology Company with the fastest time-to-value in the gen AI era. We achieve that by combining our transformation expertise with low/no-code platforms and generative AI. That’s how we create sustainable customer value. In practice, that means helping our customers to develop the interplay between business and technology: to design, build and implement transformations and business-friendly technology solutions.
   

  

 We are more than 800 top notch professionals with diverse backgrounds, working with customers from all sectors and various industries. We are a people business, and we believe it’s our people’s competence that counts.
   

  

 We want you to add your skills into the mix. At Sofigate, you will find plenty of collective know-how to draw on, along with opportunities to learn and grow
   

  

 Our values Dare, Care and Grow are visible in our every day life - find out more about Sofigate and join us!

title: Solutions Owner - Operations Portofolio
description:
**BRAVIDA – BUSINESS TECHNOLOGY**
**Solution Owner – Operations Portfolio**
**Ingress**
*Vill du vara med och utveckla framtidens systemstöd för en av Nordens ledande installations- och serviceaktörer?*
 Bravida söker nu en Solution Owner till Operations Portfolio inom Business Technology. Hos oss får du en central roll i att utveckla och förvalta affärskritiska system i en komplex nordisk verksamhet, där du driver både stabilitet i dagens lösningar och riktning för framtidens digitala förmågor.
   

  

**Ditt nya jobb**
 Som Solution Owner på Bravida ansvarar du för en eller flera affärskritiska lösningar inom Operations Portfolio. Du arbetar nära verksamheten, Business Owners, arkitekter, leverantörer och kollegor inom Business Technology för att säkerställa att lösningarna utvecklas i rätt riktning, fungerar stabilt i vardagen och skapar tydligt affärsvärde. Rollen kombinerar strategiskt ansvar med operativt genomförande. Du driver prioriteringar, följer upp leverans och bidrar till kontinuerlig förbättring.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:**
* Säkerställa roadmap och långsiktig utveckling av lösningarna
* Omsätta affärsbehov till prioriterad backlog
* Säkerställa stabil drift och följa upp incidenter, risker och KPI:er
* Följa upp leveranser från interna team och externa leverantörer
* Ansvara för budget, kostnadsuppföljning och leverantörsstyrning
* Säkerställa värderealisering och efterlevnad


 Du arbetar i nära partnerskap med Business Owner där ni gemensamt ansvarar för prioritering, roadmap och uppföljning av affärsvärde, med tydlig rollfördelning mellan affär och lösning. Tillsammans säkerställer ni att lösningarna utvecklas i linje med affärens behov, att rätt initiativ prioriteras och att förändringar genomförs på ett strukturerat sätt. Rollen innebär många kontaktytor och ett nära samarbete med både interna team och externa leverantörer.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap, teknik eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av applikationsförvaltning, systemförvaltning eller service delivery management
* God förståelse för affärsprocesser, IT-lösningsarkitektur och samspelet mellan verksamhet och IT
* Erfarenhet av att omsätta affärsbehov till krav, prioriteringar och lösningar som skapar verksamhetsnytta
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i komplexa systemlandskap med flera intressenter och beroenden
* Erfarenhet av att driva prioritering och beslut i miljöer med många konkurrerande behov
* Kunskap om IT-governance, portföljstyrning samt agila och/eller projektbaserade arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet av leverantörs- och avtalshantering samt uppföljning av servicenivåer
* Mycket god förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Som person är du strukturerad, trygg i att fatta beslut och van att navigera i en komplex miljö med många intressenter. Du har ett starkt helhetsperspektiv och drivs av att omsätta behov till konkreta resultat som skapar värde i verksamheten.
   

  

**Bravida som arbetsgivare**
 På Bravida är vi stolta över att leverera känslan när allt bara fungerar. Våra medarbetare har byggt förtroende hos våra kunder sedan 1922 och är hjärtat i vår organisation. Tillsammans levererar vi de mest energieffektiva tekniska lösningarna. Hos oss har du möjlighet att göra skillnad för en mer hållbar framtid. Vi värdesätter mångfald och strävar efter att skapa en säker och inkluderande arbetsplats där alla känner sig välkomna och uppskattade. Din säkerhet kommer först, alltid.
   

  

 Genom våra interna utbildningar erbjuder vi utvecklingsmöjligheter, och i vår starka gemenskap hjälper vi varandra att lyckas. Som en del av vårt team får du chansen att utvecklas både personligt och professionellt. Vi är stolta över att vara ett av Nordens ledande företag inom vår bransch, vilket ger oss möjlighet att erbjuda förmåner som exempelvis förmånliga pensionsavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och vidareutbildning. Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Bravida här.
   

  

**Hur söker jag jobbet?**
 Ansökningar hanteras löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum som är
 **2026-06-30** 
 . Du skickar in ditt CV och personliga brev genom att klicka på knappen Ansök nedan.
   

  

 Praktisk information:
   

  

* Omfattning: Heltid, tillsvidare
* Rapporterar till: Head of Operations Portfolio
* Kontakt: Vid frågor om tjänsten, kontakta Julia Lundeberg, Head of Operations Portfolio.


*Vi undanber oss kontakt med rekryteringsföretag i denna rekryteringsprocess.*

title: Nordic Public Affairs Manager
description:
**Verisure is seeking an experienced and passionate Public Affairs Manager to join our Nordic Cluster Legal and Public Affairs team. This is a critical, high** 
 ‑
 **impact role with clear exposure internally and externally.**
**This role sits at the heart of one of Europe’s fastest-growing public companies — shaping how a #1 Nordic brand shows up to millions of customers, regulators, partners, and in the media.** 
 We are looking for a strong, hands-on leader who can shape and execute a compelling public affairs agenda and narrative for the company. This is a newly created, strategic role reflecting the growing importance of public affairs in reinforcing our impact and presence in the Nordics and globally. The Public Affairs manager will lead and develop Verisure’s regulatory and government relations agenda in the Swedish market as well as contributing to the broader Public Affairs strategy across the Nordic region.
   

  

**This is a rare opportunity to step into a high-growth, high-performing and profitable business with a clear mission: to protect what matters most.** 
 Verisure operates in a category with remarkably low market penetration, offering vast potential for expansion. Our growth is rapid, resilient, and highly profitable — powered by a recurring revenue model and deep, long-term customer relationships. What sets Verisure apart is the strength of our platform: a robust, scalable operating model and a high-performing culture rooted in purpose.
   

  

**We’re growing fast, we’re doing it right — and we’re still just getting started.**
**About Verisure**
**Verisure is the leading provider of professionally monitored security services with 24/7 response in Europe and Latin America.** 
 Every day, our dedicated teams use leading technology to Deter, Detect, Verify and Intervene to protect our residential and small business customers against intrusion, burglary, fires, physical attack, home occupation, theft from a business, life-threatening emergencies and other hazards that may risk the safety, wellbeing or condition of our customers and their properties.
   

  

**We protect a portfolio of over 6.3 million customers across 18 countries.** 
 In 14 of our 18 geographies, we lead the category in terms of customers served and we continue to gain market share. We have a strong track record of profitable and resilient growth, primarily delivered organically by our codified and industrialised business model with high share of recurring revenues (about 90%) and industry leading retention.
   

  

**Our mission is to give our customers peace of mind by protecting what matters most to them. We believe that everyone has the right to feel safe and secure.**
*For the year ended 31 December 2025, Verisure delivered another year of strong, profitable growth, generating €3.7 billion in Total Revenue, €1.7 billion in Adjusted EBITDA (46% margin) and €953 million in Adjusted EBIT (25% margin).* 
 For more information:
 **www.verisure.com** 

**Verisure in the Nordics**
**Born in Sweden over 35 years ago, Verisure has grown from a local pioneer into the leading provider of monitored security solutions across the Nordic region and globally.** 
 Today, Sweden stands as our third largest market and Norway as our fifth, with Denmark and Finland playing critical strategic roles in our portfolio. All four countries have delivered exceptional growth over the past five years and hold #1 positions in their respective markets.
   

  

**With more than 2,000 passionate colleagues and partners across the Nordics, we proudly protect homes and small businesses every day.** 
 As we continue to scale and accelerate, strengthening our brand, reputation, and trust with customers, communities, and key stakeholders is essential. Our ambition is clear: to make the Nordics the most recognized and most preferred security provider in the region.
   

  

**Responsibilities Of The Nordic Public Affairs Manager**
 The role is responsible for the development and execution of the Public Affairs strategy and operational plan, ensuring it is closely aligned with business priorities, risk management considerations, and long‑term growth ambitions. The position is part of the Legal, Regulatory & Government Affairs function and involves close collaboration with Group and regional stakeholders to ensure a consistent, proactive, and well‑coordinated Public Affairs strategy, including alignment with European‑level legislative and policy initiatives.
   

  

 This newly created, high impact role leads the development of the public affairs agenda across the Nordics, reflecting its growing importance in our strategic agenda and as a public company. You will shape and elevate the function — building on strong foundations while driving new initiatives that support our next phase of growth. This is a significant opportunity to influence and shape Verisure’s external positioning in a highly regulated and continuously evolving environment.
   

  

**The role will report to the Legal Director Nordics & Sweden.** 
 You will work with the Nordic team, group team and external partners supported by a network of transversal resources, expertise, and best practice sharing to maximise collective impact.
   

  

**It is a role with real impact, visibility, and the ability to shape the next chapter of Verisure’s story.** 
 This is a rare opportunity to build and scale an important function in a high growth B2C environment—shaping public perception and regulation, while influencing business critical messaging, and working directly with senior leaders.
   

  

**Core Responsibilities**
* Developing and executing Verisure’s Public Affairs and regulatory strategies in Sweden and extending to the rest of the Nordics, aligned with business objectives and Group priorities.
* Establishing, maintaining, and strengthening professional relationships with Swedish regulators, policymakers, government authorities, and relevant industry associations.
* Monitoring and analysing regulatory, political, and legislative developments and translating these into clear, actionable, and strategic guidance for local management and Group stakeholders.
* Representing Verisure in external forums, trade associations, and advocacy platforms in Sweden.
* Supporting the development of policy positions, regulatory messaging, and advocacy strategies relevant to the security, technology, and connected services sectors.
* Collaborating closely with the Group Regulatory & Public Affairs team on EU￼level advocacy strategies, including relevant legislative and regulatory dossiers.
* Ensuring alignment and consistency across Swedish, Nordic, and EU‑level Public Affairs activities and messaging.
* Coordinating with Group and regional teams to support coherent execution of Regulatory & Public Affairs initiatives across the Nordic countries.
* Providing input to, and - where relevant - oversight of, Regulatory & Public Affairs activities in Denmark, Norway, and Finland.
* Identifying emerging regulatory risks and opportunities and proactively proposing initiatives to mitigate risk and support sustainable business growth.
* Supporting senior leadership in high‑level stakeholder engagement and strategic external interactions.
* Working closely with internal functions, including Communications, Marketing, Procurement, and other relevant business areas, to ensure internal alignment on regulatory developments and compliance requirements.


**Candidate profile**
**Experience And Qualifications**
**We’re looking for a seasoned public affairs manager who brings credibility, maturity, and impact from day one — and who is equally excited to continue learning, growing, and building with us.** 
 Someone with strong strategic judgement, hands-on execution skills, and the energy to shape a function in motion. You combine proven public affairs and regulatory expertise with curiosity, adaptability, and a growth mindset. A leader we can trust immediately, and invest in long term.‑on execution skills, and the energy to shape a function in motion.
   

  

* Proven track record of delivering results in a public affairs and regulatory role at scale within global, fast‑paced B2C environments (retail, telco, FMCG, subscription‑based services), generally gained over ~8 to 10 years, with substantial experience working across international/multicultural, and remote team structures.
* Strategic public affairs and regulatory leader with the ability to design, devleop and execute external strategies that elevate and influence broader industry positioning — shaping the company’s role not only as a market leader, but also as a credible regional and sector voice.
* Strong spokesperson capability, experienced in shaping narratives, building relationships and influencing strategic agendas. You have a strong track record of engagement with Swedish and potentially Nordic regulatory authorities and policymakers.
* Senior stakeholder influencer, able to advise, challenge, and partner with senior leaders through clear communication, business acumen, and a collaborative, credible presence.
* Experienced project leader with strong planning and structural discipline — able to take initiatives from concept to execution, building coherent, end to end plans (scoping, strategy, KPIs, delivery) and driving multi market, cross functional work with clarity and pace. Ability to guide, coach, and elevate team members and cross‑functional partners.
* Native Swedish speaker with fluency in English (written and spoken); additional Nordic languages are a strong asset.
* Bachelor’s degree or higher in public affairs, economy, business administration, law or related field.
* Experience from regulated and publicly listed companies in telco, tech, or other related fields would be an asset. Experience from preparatory legislative work in Parliament or relevant Authority would also be an asset in the role.


**Core competencies**
* Problem Solving and Analytics – strong at structuring complex problems through quantitatively sound analysis, demonstrating exceptional business and commercial judgment. Ability to synthesize information into actionable conclusionsenabling efficient decision making.
* Agility and Flexibility - thrives in dynamic environments, adapting swiftly to new information and changing circumstances, and with a solid ability to navigate and operate successfully amidst complexity.
* Effectiveness and Impact - self-motivated, proactive in self-development and demonstrates a hands-on approach to deliver by rolling up their sleeves and deep dive into the details
* Entrepreneurial - forward thinker who can challenges the status quo while maintaining a strong customer focus. Willing to take a "hands on" approach, while keeping the strategic objectives in mind.
* Communication - active listener, with high emotional intelligence and decision-making ability with discernment, who communicates clearly and effectively, projecting credibility, capable of influencing stakeholders across various levels.Also good at managing with confidentiality.


**Strong Fit With Our Company DNA**
**Passionate in Everything We Do:** 
 Our people bring a contagious energy and a sense of urgency that is unmistakable. We create a vision and inspire others around that vision with full engagement and focus. We are all-in, and we love what we do.
   

  

**Committed to Making a Difference:** 
 We are courageous, we deliver what we promise through hard work and resilience. We make a difference, through operating with discipline and doing what is needed. We are hands-on, and we aren’t afraid to get into the detail. We deliver results and we execute with excellence.
   

  

**Always Innovating:** 
 Our people make the impossible possible; it’s a continuous state of mind. We are purpose-driven, curious and we challenge the status quo. We believe good ideas travel, we share and reapply. We take smart risks, and we are not afraid to fail. We believe innovation can be big or small.
   

  

**Winning as a Team:** 
 We are determined to become number 1, and to do that we need to listen to one another, collaborate and work together. We play our part, fueled by a winning attitude and a fighting spirit. We celebrate our successes. We play to our strengths and our diversity to deliver even better outcomes, while developing and supporting one another. We believe that together we go further, and that nothing is impossible.
   

  

**With Trust & Responsibility:** 
 Our people take responsibility for the people we protect. We are accountable and reliable. We role model operating with integrity. We trust and empower one another to do the right thing, always. We deliver on our promise through world-class expertise and meticulous know-how. And, we do this with humility while being honoured to play such an important role in society.
   

  

**Strong fit with Verisure RISE Leadership Model**
**R** 
**ole Model Responsible Owner:** 
 Acting as a long-term owner, always putting the customer first, thinking and acting big and being accountable and responsible.
   

  

**I** 
**nspire Outstanding Performance:** 
 Motivating others for high performance, prioritising and making decisions with an analytical approach and executing with excellence.
   

  

**S** 
**trengthen and grow a high-performance, diverse organisation:** 
 Building high-performance and diverse teams, enhancing a learning culture by setting continuously higher standards.
   

  

**E** 
**mpower and lead with courage, integrity, and purpose:** 
 Inspiring our people, honouring our mission and purpose by leading with confidence, positive energy and genuine empathy and humility.
   

  

**Diversity, inclusion, equity, and belonging at Verisure**
 At Verisure, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace, recognising that diversity of thought and background only makes our teams stronger and more innovative. We reject all forms of discrimination and bias, and we believe in access to opportunities for everyone, regardless of gender, age, disability status, race, sexual orientation, or any other status.

title: Growth Manager - Consumer Demand & Analytics (Uber Eats)
description:
**About The Role**
 At Uber, we close the gap between the digital and physical worlds to move people and things in real time. As the Consumer Growth Lead for Sweden, you will shape and execute the demand and consumer growth strategy to position Uber Eats as the preferred food delivery platform in the market. This isn't a role where you follow a polished playbook-it's one where you help write it. You will own high-impact initiatives spanning large-scale data analysis, complex problem-solving, and the end-to-end execution of growth programs that reach millions of Eaters.
   

  

 This role is ideal for an analytical self-starter who thrives on ownership and is energized by a fast-paced, highly ambiguous environment. The work is deeply rewarding but operationally complex; you must be comfortable moving seamlessly between high-level P&L strategy and gritty, hands-on implementation. We operate at global scale under real-world constraints, meaning you will need to make smart, high-stakes decisions with imperfect information. If you possess a low-ego, collaborative mindset, a relentless curiosity, and the resilience to navigate shifting market priorities, this is where you'll grow.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Navigate Complex Data Environments: Autonomously extract, manipulate, and model large datasets using advanced SQL to uncover deep insights into consumer behavior and demand dynamics.
* Drive Strategic Investment: Evaluate the performance of demand-generation budgets and P&L dynamics, making high-quality, quantitative trade-offs to optimize user acquisition, retention, and engagement.
* Build Scalable Infrastructure: Design, build, and maintain robust dashboards and key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure project success and ensure data-driven decision-making across teams.
* Run Rigorous Experiments: Formulate hypotheses, design, and evaluate structural marketplace experiments, balancing speed with statistical precision to continuously optimize conversion and return on investment.
* Execute High-Stakes Campaigns: Own and deploy end-to-end lifecycle growth programs across owned channels (In-app, CRM, etc.), managing the operational messiness and tight timelines of an explosive growth market.
* Influence Without Authority: Act as the central connector across Sweden's senior leadership, Strategy & Planning, Strategic Finance, and global growth teams, navigating internal friction and aligning conflicting stakeholder priorities.
* Champion Operational Excellence: Translate unstructured, ambiguous growth problems into highly focused frameworks and actionable execution plans, maintaining an uncompromising eye for detail when pressure is high.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Educational Background: Bachelor's or advanced degree in Business Analytics, Engineering, Mathematics, Finance, Econometrics, or an equivalent quantitative discipline.
* Data & Analytics Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in SQL (writing complex queries, navigating multi-layered databases) and exceptional Excel/Google Sheets capabilities for managing large datasets.
* Analytical Experience: Proven professional experience running quantitative data analysis, business modeling, and market experiments.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Problem Solving & Framework Generation: Strong ability to convert highly ambiguous customer or business challenges into structured, actionable strategies while balancing short-term tactical needs with long-term financial sustainability.
* Resilient Execution & Detail Orientation: A track record of operating efficiently within fast-moving, dynamic environments, showcasing a diligent approach to data accuracy alongside swift execution.
* Strategic Stakeholder Management: Experience building rapid rapport with cross-functional partners and leadership, with the confidence to challenge assumptions and push back effectively using data.
* Customer Obsession & Curiosity: A natural inclination to self-start, investigate root causes, master new analytical tools, and build processes deeply rooted in consumer needs.


**Let's ride together**
 Ready to ride? This isn't the kind of place where you follow a playbook - it's where you help write one. If you're driven by impact, energized by challenge, and ready to shape how the world moves - we'd love to hear from you.

title: Cobolutvecklare
description:
Systemutvecklare inom mainframe-teamet som arbetar med systemen kopplat till kundens gruppförsäkringsaffär. Konsulten vi letar efter ska vara senior.
   

  

**Erfarenhetskrav**
* Mycket bred och djup erfarenhet av Cobol-utveckling inom Mainframe (IBMz)
* CICS
* JCL
* Beprövad förmåga till självständighet och att snabbt sätta sig in i nya sammanhang och miljöer


**Meriterande**
* DB2 och SQL
* AQT (Advanced Query Tool)
* Compuware Topaz


 Erfarenhet från försäkringsbranschen – särskilt sakförsäkring.
   

  

**NÄR DU BLIR PARTNER**
 Som partnerkonsult hos Wise kliver du in i en gemenskap där samarbete är kärnan. Du får möjlighet att arbeta med några av marknadens mest intressanta uppdrag, i organisationer där både människor och teknik är i centrum. För oss är det avgörande att du känner dig trygg och värdesatt i vårt samarbete. Vi stöttar dig, coachar dig och finns med dig hela vägen genom uppdraget. Hos oss är du inte bara konsult – du blir en del av en större helhet.
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vänta därför inte med din ansökan.
   

  

 Har du frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig konsultchef (NAMN & MAIL).

title: Treasury Analyst
description:
*Studies show that women and underrepresented groups often hesitate to apply unless they meet every requirement. At Stegra, we’re building an impact-driven, sustainable company - and we need a diverse, inclusive team to make it happen.*
*If you share our passion but don’t meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply anyway. You might be the perfect fit for this role, or another as we grow.*
 At Stegra, we’re not just building a plant, we’re proving that sustainable industry is possible. And to do that, we need people like you.
   

  

 Join a team where safety comes first. Where we support each other, learn as we go, and make space for everyone to grow and contribute. This is your chance to be part of something big - while being closer to nature and leading a balanced, purposeful life.
   

  

 Treasury Analyst
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

 Right now, we are looking for a Treasury Analyst for our Treasury team. In this role you will report to our Head of Treasury and sit within our Finance function. The team is responsible for managing liquidity, financial risks, treasury reporting, and supporting the development of treasury operations as Stegra continues to grow.
   

  

 Specific to this role, the day-to-day tasks will include the following but as we are a growing company with very little silos between teams, other tasks might be included as well.
   

  

* Support daily treasury operations, including cash positioning, payment monitoring, and internal funding activities to ensure accurate liquidity management.
* Prepare cash forecasts and liquidity reports to support short- and medium-term planning.
* Supervise market data feeds and ensure correct market valuations of financial instruments.
* Support the development and maintenance of treasury reports, including risk reports and treasury dashboards.
* Contribute to treasury projects such as process improvements, system enhancements, and documentation updates.
* Act as a superuser for the Treasury Management System and support continuous system optimization.
* Analyze banking structures and support initiatives to improve treasury efficiency and effectiveness.
* Collaborate with treasury, energy trading, and other finance teams to support treasury-related activities and information sharing.


 What you’ll bring
   

  

 You’re curious and believe that real progress happens when we work together. You’re not afraid to challenge old ways of thinking - and you treat others with respect while doing it. At Stegra, we value people who take initiative, build trust, and help create a workplace where everyone can do their best.
   

  

 Specific to this role, we would like to see that you can tick off a fair amount of the boxes below
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
* 2–5 years of experience within treasury, finance, or a related field.
* Understanding of treasury processes and financial instruments.
* Experience working with treasury systems, trading platforms, or similar tools.
* Strong Excel skills and experience working with financial data analysis.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
* Ability to collaborate effectively across teams and functions.
* Understanding of risk models, energy markets, Power BI, or working with large datasets is considered an advantage.


**Benefits At Stegra**
 At Stegra, you’ll join a company where your work has real impact on the climate, the industry, and future generations. We’re building a culture rooted in safety, trust, and inclusion, where people feel supported to grow and thrive.
   

  

 You’ll receive fair, competitive compensation aligned with collective agreements, along with benefits like up to 30 days of paid vacation, occupational pension, parental benefits, and insurance. If you need support with relocation or immigration, our relocation department will help guide you through the process, whether it’s permits, housing or other practical matters. You can also enjoy perks like subsidized gym memberships and bike leases.
   

  

**Read More About Benefits At Stegra Here.**
**This is Stegra**
 Stegra is on a mission to change the global steel industry by producing green hydrogen, iron, and steel - with the goal of eliminating CO₂ emissions. Instead of coal, we use green hydrogen and fossil-free electricity, meaning our primary emissions will be water and heat.
   

  

 By 2030, our ambition is to produce 5 million tonnes of green steel annually in our fully integrated, digitized, and sustainable plant in Boden, Northern Sweden - currently under construction. But this is just the beginning. Our expertise in green hydrogen will enable us to decarbonize industries beyond steel, paving the way for a cleaner future.
   

  

**Our Stockholm Office**
 Our modern Stockholm office is located on Norra Stationsgatan, close to Karolinska University Hospital in central Stockholm. Here, you’ll find a bright, collaborative workspace where cross-functional teams connect, share ideas, and drive progress. Whether you're visiting regularly or working hybrid, you'll be part of a vibrant office culture with easy access to the city’s energy and amenities.
   

  

*Founded in 2020, Stegra (formerly H2 Green Steel) was created with the purpose to decarbonize hard-to-abate industry. Construction of our first project – an integrated plant producing green hydrogen, green iron and green steel – is well underway in Boden, Sweden. Slashing emissions using green hydrogen and renewable electricity, we’re starting a clean industrial revolution. Steel is just the beginning. Together, we focus on delivering green impact – for our people, customers, investors, society and planet.*

title: Medicinsk sekreterare med samordnande ansvar till WeMind Rinkeby
description:
*Vill du bidra till trygg och välfungerande vård inom specialistpsykiatrin?*
